items.title: Estée Lauder’s ‘Origins’ downs ‘Cristiano Ronaldo’ TM application
items.title_zh: 雅诗兰黛'Origins'成功阻击'Cristiano Ronaldo'商标申请
items.title_en: UKIPO Rejects 'Cristiano Ronaldo Origins' Mark After Estée Lauder Opposition
items.summary: UKIPO rejects trademark application for 'Cristiano Ronaldo Origins' following opposition by Beck Greener client in a rare case that considered actual use
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）驳回了包含'Cristiano Ronaldo Origins'字样的商标申请。该决定源于雅诗兰黛旗下品牌'Origins'提出的异议。本案罕见地深入考量了异议商标在英国的实际使用情况，最终认定存在混淆可能性，从而维护了在先权利人的利益，阻止了该含名人姓名商标的注册。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has refused a trademark application containing the phrase 'Cristiano Ronaldo Origins'. This decision follows a successful opposition filed by a client of Beck Greener, representing Estée Lauder’s 'Origins' brand. The case is notable for its detailed examination of actual use evidence within the United Kingdom. The hearing officer determined that the opponent had demonstrated genuine use of their mark in the relevant sector. Consequently, the authority found a likelihood of confusion between the applied-for mark and the earlier rights. This ruling underscores the importance of proving real-world usage in opposition proceedings, ultimately protecting the interests of the prior rights holder and preventing the registration of a mark incorporating both a celebrity name and an established brand term.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请含名人姓名或通用词汇商标时，务必提前检索在先权利。即便对方看似未大规模使用，只要证明其在特定领域有真实使用且可能引发混淆，异议极易成功。建议加强前期尽职调查，避免盲目提交申请导致资源浪费。
items.ai_insight_en: Applicants seeking to register marks containing celebrity names or common terms must conduct rigorous clearance searches for existing rights. Even if a cited mark appears inactive or lacks broad commercial visibility, demonstrating genuine use in a specific niche can be decisive in opposition proceedings. Rights holders should prioritize collecting and preserving robust evidence of actual use to support enforcement actions. Conversely, applicants should avoid filing without assessing potential conflicts based on localized market presence, as perceived lack of scale does not guarantee immunity from successful opposition claims based on confusion.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO 驳回含 C 罗姓名及 Origins 字样的商标申请", "案件罕见地重点审查了异议商标的实际使用证据", "雅诗兰黛基于混淆可能性成功阻击竞争对手注册"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UKIPO rejected the 'Cristiano Ronaldo Origins' application following a successful opposition by Estée Lauder's Origins brand.", "The decision relied heavily on a rare, thorough assessment of the opponent's actual use evidence within the UK market.", "The office found a likelihood of confusion, thereby upholding prior rights and blocking the new registration."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["申请含名人元素商标需警惕在先普通商标的实际使用", "欧洲异议程序中，实际使用证据往往是决胜关键"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Marks combining celebrity names with generic terms face high rejection risks if conflicting prior rights show genuine local use.", "Practice note: In European oppositions, concrete evidence of actual use often outweighs arguments regarding the scale of commercial exploitation.", "What to monitor: Monitor opposition outcomes where actual use evidence determines the likelihood of confusion despite limited market footprint."]
core_points_en: UKIPO rejected the 'Cristiano Ronaldo Origins' application following a successful opposition by Estée Lauder's Origins brand.
The decision relied heavily on a rare, thorough assessment of the opponent's actual use evidence within the UK market.
The office found a likelihood of confusion, thereby upholding prior rights and blocking the new registration.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Marks combining celebrity names with generic terms face high rejection risks if conflicting prior rights show genuine local use.
Practice note: In European oppositions, concrete evidence of actual use often outweighs arguments regarding the scale of commercial exploitation.
What to monitor: Monitor opposition outcomes where actual use evidence determines the likelihood of confusion despite limited market footprint.

items.title: EU copyright law roundup – first trimester of 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年第一季度欧盟版权法综述：关键判例与政策
items.title_en: EU Copyright Roundup Q1 2026: CJEU on Critical Editions and AG Opinion on Geoblocking
items.summary: Welcome to our first roundup for 2026. In the first trimester of this year, several important developments have taken place in the EU copyright law arena. As our regular audience will know, in this series we have been reporting on CJEU judgments, Advocate General (AG) Opinions (if any) and significant policy developments.You can read the previous roundups here.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文综述 2026 年首季欧盟版权法动态，重点分析两起 CJEU 相关案件。一是 Anne Frank Fonds 案中总法官就向公众传播权、地理封锁及 VPN 规避发表意见；二是 Institutul G. Călinescu 案判决，确立公共领域作品批判性版本若体现作者个性智力创造，可获版权保护，重申 Cofemel 案双重标准。
items.ai_summary_en: This roundup covers key EU copyright developments from the first trimester of 2026. The Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU) ruled in Institutul G. Călinescu that critical editions of public domain works may qualify for copyright protection if they reflect the author's personality through free and creative choices, reaffirming the Cofemel standards. Additionally, Advocate General Rantos delivered an opinion in Anne Frank Fonds regarding the communication to the public right, geoblocking, and potential circumvention via VPNs. These cases address fundamental questions on work definition and digital enforcement mechanisms.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业整理公版素材或开发数字内容时，需注意批判性编辑可能产生新版权。涉及跨境流媒体服务应关注地理封锁合规风险，避免因技术规避手段引发侵权纠纷，建议提前评估内容独创性。
items.ai_insight_en: The Călinescu judgment clarifies the threshold for copyrightability of editorial efforts on public domain materials, impacting how publishers and digital archives approach critical editions. Rights holders must ensure such editions demonstrate free and creative choices to meet the originality standard. Meanwhile, the pending Anne Frank Fonds case highlights ongoing legal scrutiny of geoblocking practices and technical circumvention, which remains relevant for cross-border digital service compliance and enforcement strategies within the EU.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["总法官就地理封锁与 VPN 规避发表法律意见", "法院裁定批判性版本在具备创造性时可受保护", "重申作品须为智力创造且表达需精确客观的标准"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["CJEU held that critical editions of public domain works can be protected works if they constitute intellectual creation reflecting the author's personality.", "Protection requires the work to be identifiable with sufficient precision and objectivity, reaffirming the cumulative conditions from Cofemel.", "Advocate General Rantos issued an opinion on communication to the public rights, addressing geobblocking and VPN circumvention issues."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["公版内容再创作需评估是否构成新的智力创造", "跨境数字服务应警惕地理封锁与规避技术的合规风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Publishers and digital content providers should assess whether their critical editions or annotated public domain works meet the strict originality criteria esta…", "Practice note: When preparing derivative works based on public domain texts, document the specific creative choices and intellectual contributions to support claims of authorship…", "What to monitor: Await the final CJEU judgment in Anne Frank Fonds (C-788/24) for definitive guidance on the interaction between communication to the public rights, geoblocking ob…"]
core_points_en: CJEU held that critical editions of public domain works can be protected works if they constitute intellectual creation reflecting the author's personality.
Protection requires the work to be identifiable with sufficient precision and objectivity, reaffirming the cumulative conditions from Cofemel.
Advocate General Rantos issued an opinion on communication to the public rights, addressing geobblocking and VPN circumvention issues.

What to monitor: Await the final CJEU judgment in Anne Frank Fonds (C-788/24) for definitive guidance on the interaction between communication to the public rights, geoblocking ob…

items.title: Patent Unlocked - Apple
items.title_zh: 专利解锁：EPO 裁定苹果双击支付功能具备可专利性
items.title_en: EPO Board Rules Apple's Double-Click Payment Feature Is Patentable
items.summary: Introduction: Double‑Click Payments and Patentability at the EPO Many of us will be aware of Apple's double click to pay functionality,...
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析 EPO 上诉委员会在 T 0035/20 号案件中的裁决，推翻了审查部关于苹果“双击支付”功能缺乏技术特征的认定。该案涉及在不解锁手机前提下通过双击主页键结合指纹验证进行接触式支付。上诉委员会指出，复用同一传感器和按键实现不同功能存在技术难度，并非简单的用户交互映射，从而确认了其技术性。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines the EPO Board of Appeal decision in T 0035/20, which overturned the Examining Division’s finding that Apple’s double-click payment feature lacked technical character. The case concerns contactless payments initiated via a double press of the home button combined with fingerprint verification, without unlocking the smartphone. The Board determined that reusing the same sensor and button for distinct functions involves specific technical challenges rather than being a mere user interaction mapping. Consequently, the decision confirms the technical nature of the invention, distinguishing it from non-technical administrative or business methods previously cited by the examining authority.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请涉及人机交互或生物识别的专利时，应着重阐述硬件资源复用带来的具体技术难题及解决方案，避免被简单归类为非技术性用户习惯，以提升授权前景。
items.ai_insight_en: For applicants seeking patent protection in Europe for human-computer interaction or biometric technologies, it is critical to articulate the specific technical difficulties arising from hardware resource reuse. Drafting strategies should avoid framing features merely as user convenience or habit mappings. Instead, applications must detail the underlying technical implementation and conflict resolution mechanisms. This approach helps overcome objections regarding non-technical subject matter, thereby improving the likelihood of grant for innovations involving complex interface logic and shared hardware components.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO 上诉委员会认定双击支付方案包含具体技术考量而非单纯用户交互", "复用主页键与指纹传感器实现解锁与支付双重功能被判定具有技术贡献", "该裁决明确了混合特征发明中技术性问题判断的 Comvik 方法适用边界"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO Board found the double-click payment scheme involves concrete technical considerations beyond simple user interaction design.", "Reusing the home button and fingerprint sensor for both unlocking and payment was judged to provide a genuine technical contribution.", "The ruling clarifies the application boundaries of the Comvik approach for assessing technical problems in mixed-feature inventions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["强调硬件复用带来的技术冲突与解决路径是应对非技术性质疑的关键", "在撰写涉及交互逻辑的专利申请时需明确其背后的底层技术实现细节"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Emphasizing technical conflicts and solutions resulting from hardware reuse is key to overcoming non-technical objections.", "Practice note: Patent applications involving interaction logic must clearly define the underlying technical implementation details.", "What to monitor: How the EPO applies the Comvik approach to future cases involving shared sensors for multiple device functions."]
core_points_en: The EPO Board found the double-click payment scheme involves concrete technical considerations beyond simple user interaction design.
Reusing the home button and fingerprint sensor for both unlocking and payment was judged to provide a genuine technical contribution.
The ruling clarifies the application boundaries of the Comvik approach for assessing technical problems in mixed-feature inventions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Emphasizing technical conflicts and solutions resulting from hardware reuse is key to overcoming non-technical objections.
Practice note: Patent applications involving interaction logic must clearly define the underlying technical implementation details.
What to monitor: How the EPO applies the Comvik approach to future cases involving shared sensors for multiple device functions.

items.title: Don’t let someone else pull your pint: Trade Marks for UK Breweries in 2026
items.title_zh: 勿让他人窃取品牌：2026 年英国啤酒厂商标指南
items.title_en: Protecting UK Brewery Brands: Navigating Rising Trademark Disputes and Registration Strategies for 2026
items.summary: There’s something reassuring about a hand-pulled pint in a proper pub. Solid name on the pump clip, bit of local pride, job done....
items.ai_summary_zh: 文章指出英国饮料行业商标纠纷激增，独立酿酒厂常因依赖未注册权利而陷入高昂诉讼。分析强调注册商标优于普通法仿冒之诉，并警示包装设计相似性风险。同时建议通过非使用撤销程序清理“僵尸商标”，呼吁企业提前布局核心品牌并监控市场动态。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK drinks sector is experiencing a significant surge in trademark disputes, with independent breweries increasingly facing legal challenges. Relying on unregistered rights and common law passing off actions proves costly and evidentially burdensome for rights holders. Registered trademarks offer superior enforcement capabilities compared to the complex requirements of proving goodwill. Furthermore, conflicts now frequently extend beyond brand names to encompass packaging designs, color schemes, and overall visual aesthetics. This shift creates substantial infringement risks, particularly when products compete on crowded retail shelves. To mitigate these threats, market participants are advised to proactively register core brands and utilize non-use cancellation procedures to clear obsolete registrations from the register. Such strategic measures help prevent barriers to entry and ensure robust protection against similarity-based claims in a competitive landscape.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国酒类出口企业应摒弃“先用权”思维，在英国市场优先完成商标与外观注册。需建立定期监测机制，主动清理障碍商标，防范因包装近似引发的侵权指控，确保品牌出海安全。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants entering or operating within the UK beverage sector should prioritize early trademark registration to avoid the complexities and expenses associated with common law passing off actions. Establishing a robust portfolio provides a stronger defensive position against infringement claims. Additionally, companies must conduct thorough clearance searches for packaging elements, as visual similarity poses significant compliance risks. Implementing regular monitoring mechanisms allows rights holders to identify potential conflicts early and actively manage the register by removing unused marks. This proactive approach ensures brand security and minimizes exposure to costly litigation regarding both brand names and distinctive trade dress in a highly competitive environment.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["依赖未注册权利导致举证困难且成本高昂，注册商标可确立维权优势", "商标争议已扩展至包装设计与整体视觉效果，不仅限于名称冲突", "利用非使用撤销程序清除闲置商标，避免被陈旧注册阻碍新品牌进入"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Reliance on unregistered rights creates high litigation costs and evidentiary burdens, whereas registered trademarks provide clear, enforceable legal advantages.", "Trademark disputes now frequently involve packaging design and overall visual appearance, extending beyond simple name conflicts to include aesthetic similarities.", "Utilizing non-use cancellation procedures helps remove dormant registrations, preventing obsolete marks from obstructing new brand entries and market expansion."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["赴英酒企须将商标注册前置，避免陷入被动举证与普通法诉讼泥潭", "重视包装设计的独创性与检索，防范因视觉元素近似导致的合规风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Prioritize early trademark registration in the UK to secure enforceable rights and avoid the high costs and evidentiary difficulties of common law passing off ac…", "Practice note: Conduct comprehensive clearance searches for packaging designs and visual elements to mitigate infringement risks arising from aesthetic similarities in crowded ret…", "What to monitor: Implement regular watch services to detect conflicting applications and actively pursue non-use cancellations to clear obsolete registrations that may block new b…"]
core_points_en: Reliance on unregistered rights creates high litigation costs and evidentiary burdens, whereas registered trademarks provide clear, enforceable legal advantages.
Trademark disputes now frequently involve packaging design and overall visual appearance, extending beyond simple name conflicts to include aesthetic similarities.
Utilizing non-use cancellation procedures helps remove dormant registrations, preventing obsolete marks from obstructing new brand entries and market expansion.

Practice note: Conduct comprehensive clearance searches for packaging designs and visual elements to mitigate infringement risks arising from aesthetic similarities in crowded ret…
What to monitor: Implement regular watch services to detect conflicting applications and actively pursue non-use cancellations to clear obsolete registrations that may block new b…

items.title: Insights and AnalysisEU Design Act: Designing the future - why the EU Design Act matters for medical devices07 April 2026
items.title_zh: 欧盟外观设计法：为何其对医疗器械至关重要
items.title_en: EU Design Act Impact on Medical Devices: Registration, Repair Parts, and GUI Protection
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析即将实施的《欧盟外观设计法》对医疗器械行业的深远影响。随着欧盟外观设计制度现代化改革，新规将改变医疗器械外观保护的注册流程、保护范围及执法标准。文章重点探讨在法规过渡期内，企业如何调整策略以应对零部件保护、维修条款及图形用户界面等新兴设计要素的合规挑战。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines the profound implications of the upcoming EU Design Act for the medical device sector. As the European Union modernizes its design protection framework, new regulations will fundamentally alter registration procedures, the scope of protection, and enforcement standards for medical devices. The article specifically addresses strategic adjustments required during the transitional period to navigate compliance challenges related to spare parts protection, repair clauses, and emerging design elements such as graphical user interfaces. It provides critical guidance for rights holders seeking to align their intellectual property strategies with the evolving legal landscape, ensuring robust protection for both physical components and digital interfaces within the newly reformed system.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国医疗器械出口企业需立即评估现有产品线在欧盟的新规合规性，特别是针对维修备件和软件界面的设计布局。建议提前进行自由实施分析（FTO），并利用过渡期优化外观设计组合，以防因规则变更导致市场准入受阻或侵权风险增加。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should immediately assess the compliance of existing product lines with the new EU design regulations, focusing particularly on repair spare parts and software interface layouts. Conducting freedom-to-operate analyses in advance is recommended to mitigate infringement risks. Companies should leverage the transitional period to optimize their design portfolios, preventing potential market access barriers or increased liability due to regulatory changes. Proactive adaptation ensures continued competitiveness and legal security in the European market under the reformed design protection regime.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["新规将重塑医疗器械外观设计的注册策略与保护范围界定", "维修条款例外与零部件保护规则的变化影响产品全生命周期管理", "图形用户界面等数字设计元素在新法下的可注册性得到进一步明确"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["New regulations will reshape registration strategies and redefine the scope of protection for medical device designs.", "Changes to repair clause exceptions and spare parts rules significantly impact product lifecycle management strategies.", "Registrability of digital design elements, including graphical user interfaces, is clarified under the new legislative framework."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["亟需重新评估医疗器械零部件及维修条款下的外观设计侵权风险", "应加强数字医疗界面设计的欧盟注册布局以适配新法保护范畴"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Urgent reassessment of design infringement risks for medical device components under new repair clause provisions.", "Practice note: Strengthen EU registration strategies for digital healthcare interface designs to align with expanded protection scopes.", "What to monitor: Transitional measures affecting spare parts protection and the registrability of graphical user interfaces."]
core_points_en: New regulations will reshape registration strategies and redefine the scope of protection for medical device designs.
Changes to repair clause exceptions and spare parts rules significantly impact product lifecycle management strategies.
Registrability of digital design elements, including graphical user interfaces, is clarified under the new legislative framework.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Urgent reassessment of design infringement risks for medical device components under new repair clause provisions.
Practice note: Strengthen EU registration strategies for digital healthcare interface designs to align with expanded protection scopes.
What to monitor: Transitional measures affecting spare parts protection and the registrability of graphical user interfaces.

items.title: ‘Drip pricing’ lands AA driving schools with £4.2 million fine as CMA makes use of its consumer enforcement powers
items.title_zh: 滴灌定价致 AA 驾校被罚 420 万英镑
items.title_en: CMA Imposes £4.2m Fine on AA Driving Schools for Drip Pricing Under New Powers
items.summary: Earlier today, the CMA announced that it has fined the AA and BSM driving schools (both of which are owned by the AA) the sum of £4.2 million for drip p...
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国竞争与市场管理局（CMA）首次行使直接执法权，对 AA 及其旗下 BSM 驾校的“滴灌定价”行为处以 420 万英镑罚款，并责令退还消费者 76 万英镑。该案标志着 CMA 依据《数字市场、竞争和消费者法》实质性打击隐瞒强制费用的行为，预示未来将加强对恶劣商业惯例的执法力度。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) has fined AA and BSM driving schools £4.2 million for drip pricing, marking the first use of its direct enforcement powers under the Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers Act (DMCCA). The regulator ordered refunds exceeding £760,000 to consumers after finding that mandatory booking fees were excluded from headline prices. This action signals a shift toward stricter enforcement of consumer protection laws regarding hidden charges. With 12 additional live cases underway, the CMA indicated it will target egregious practices in the coming months, reflecting broader concerns about the estimated billions lost annually by UK consumers to such tactics.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This enforcement action demonstrates the CMA's active deployment of new statutory powers to address opaque pricing structures. For rights holders and businesses operating in the UK, particularly those with online sales channels, this highlights the immediate regulatory risk associated with non-compliant price displays. The focus on 'drip pricing' suggests that transparency in mandatory charges is now a primary compliance priority, requiring careful review of customer journey interfaces to avoid significant financial penalties and reputational damage.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["CMA 首用直接执法权处罚滴灌定价行为", "AA 驾校因隐藏预订费被罚 420 万并退款", "新规下隐蔽收费成执法重点且案例将增多"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["CMA imposes £4.2 million fine on AA and BSM driving schools for excluding mandatory booking fees from headline prices.", "This case represents the first use of CMA's direct enforcement powers under the DMCCA to penalize substantive consumer law breaches.", "Regulator orders over £760,000 in consumer redress and indicates further enforcement actions against widespread drip pricing practices."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["全面排查在线定价是否隐含强制附加费用", "警惕英国监管机构对新法执法的严厉趋势"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Businesses must ensure headline prices include all mandatory charges to comply with DMCCA requirements and avoid substantial fines.", "Practice note: Review online checkout flows and advertising materials to identify and rectify any exclusion of compulsory fees from initial price displays.", "What to monitor: Watch for updates on the CMA's remaining twelve live consumer cases and future guidance on defining egregious pricing practices."]
core_points_en: CMA imposes £4.2 million fine on AA and BSM driving schools for excluding mandatory booking fees from headline prices.
This case represents the first use of CMA's direct enforcement powers under the DMCCA to penalize substantive consumer law breaches.
Regulator orders over £760,000 in consumer redress and indicates further enforcement actions against widespread drip pricing practices.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Businesses must ensure headline prices include all mandatory charges to comply with DMCCA requirements and avoid substantial fines.
Practice note: Review online checkout flows and advertising materials to identify and rectify any exclusion of compulsory fees from initial price displays.
What to monitor: Watch for updates on the CMA's remaining twelve live consumer cases and future guidance on defining egregious pricing practices.

items.title: IA et droit d’auteur : symptômes d’un monde polarisé
items.title_zh: AI 与版权：两极分化世界的症状
items.title_en: AI and Copyright: Symptoms of a Polarized World
items.summary: Par Nicolas Le Pays du Teilleul, LL.M. (London), Avocat (Paris), Membre associé du Laboratoire de Recherche du CEIPI (UR 4375) Le monde se polarise, l’innovation s’accélère. L’intelligence artificielle (IA) générative se situe à la croisée de ces deux mouvements ; elle en constitue l’une des manifestations les plus visibles. Dans un environnement marqué par l’instabilité et […] L’article IA et droit d’auteur : symptômes d’un monde polarisé est apparu en premier sur BLIP! .
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文由巴黎律师兼 CEIPI 研究员撰写，指出生成式人工智能处于世界极化与创新加速的交汇点。文章分析了在不稳定环境中，AI 技术如何引发版权制度的深刻危机，探讨了欧洲特别是法国法律界对此的担忧，认为当前局势反映了全球知识产权体系的深层撕裂。
items.ai_summary_en: Authored by Nicolas Le Pays du Teilleul, a Paris-based lawyer and CEIPI researcher, this analysis positions generative artificial intelligence at the intersection of global polarization and accelerating innovation. The article examines how AI technologies trigger a profound crisis within existing copyright frameworks amidst an environment marked by instability. It highlights growing concerns within the European, particularly French, legal community regarding these developments. The piece argues that current tensions reflect deep structural fractures in the global intellectual property system, as stakeholders struggle to reconcile rapid technological advancement with established legal norms and creator rights protections.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧部署 AI 产品需高度关注版权合规风险，尤其是训练数据来源合法性。建议提前进行 IP 尽职调查，避免卷入欧盟日益严格的版权诉讼，并关注法国等关键法域的立法动向以调整战略。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants deploying AI products in Europe must prioritize copyright compliance, specifically regarding the legitimacy of training data sources. Conducting thorough IP due diligence is essential to mitigate risks associated with increasingly strict EU copyright litigation. Stakeholders should closely monitor legislative trends in key jurisdictions like France to adapt their strategic approaches. Proactive alignment with evolving regulatory standards helps avoid potential infringement claims and ensures sustainable market entry while navigating the complex intersection of AI innovation and intellectual property rights.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["生成式 AI 加剧了全球创新与法律制度的两极分化态势", "现有版权框架在应对 AI 训练数据使用上面临严峻挑战", "欧洲法律界正寻求在保护创作者与促进技术发展间平衡"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Generative AI intensifies the polarization between global innovation dynamics and rigid legal regulatory frameworks.", "Existing copyright structures face severe challenges in addressing the use of data for AI training purposes.", "European legal experts seek to balance creator protection with the need to foster continued technological development."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严控训练数据版权来源，规避欧盟潜在侵权诉讼风险", "密切关注法欧政策风向，动态调整 AI 产品合规策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rigorously verify copyright origins of training data to mitigate potential infringement litigation risks within the EU.", "Practice note: Closely track policy shifts in France and broader Europe to dynamically adjust AI product compliance strategies.", "What to monitor: Legislative developments concerning AI training data usage and emerging case law on copyright exceptions."]
core_points_en: Generative AI intensifies the polarization between global innovation dynamics and rigid legal regulatory frameworks.
Existing copyright structures face severe challenges in addressing the use of data for AI training purposes.
European legal experts seek to balance creator protection with the need to foster continued technological development.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rigorously verify copyright origins of training data to mitigate potential infringement litigation risks within the EU.
Practice note: Closely track policy shifts in France and broader Europe to dynamically adjust AI product compliance strategies.
What to monitor: Legislative developments concerning AI training data usage and emerging case law on copyright exceptions.

items.title: A new chapter for Women’s Health: Reform, funding and opportunity
items.title_zh: 英国女性健康新篇章：改革、资金与机遇
items.title_en: UK Women’s Health Strategy: New Femtech Fund and Clinical Pathway Reforms
items.summary: The UK government published a renewed Women’s Health Strategy for England today, signalling a continued push to address long-standing gaps in how the he...
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国政府发布新版英格兰女性健康战略，旨在填补医疗服务缺口。核心举措包括设立 150 万英镑 Femtech 挑战基金，加速诊断与治疗技术创新。战略强调重构临床路径，推动数字化与社区护理，并鼓励数据驱动的研发生态，尽管基金规模较法国较小，但仍为初创企业提供关键早期资本支持。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK government has published a renewed Women’s Health Strategy for England, aiming to address systemic gaps in healthcare services for women. A central element is the introduction of a £1.5 million Femtech challenge fund designed to accelerate the adoption of innovative technologies in diagnosis and treatment. The strategy emphasizes redesigning clinical pathways for conditions such as menopause and heavy menstrual bleeding to improve diagnostic speed and care access. It also promotes digital and community-based care solutions. While the fund’s scale is modest compared to similar initiatives in France, it aims to support startups facing early capital challenges. These reforms, backed by broader NHS investment and research funding, signal a shift toward a data-driven, innovation-friendly ecosystem that encourages collaboration between industry, the NHS, and the research community.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国医疗科技企业应关注英国 Femtech 基金申请标准，利用其作为进入欧洲市场的跳板。同时需留意英国在女性健康数据合规及临床路径改革上的新趋势，调整产品注册与市场准入策略，以契合当地创新友好的政策环境。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should closely monitor the specific investment criteria and application processes for the new Femtech challenge fund, as it offers critical early-stage capital opportunities. Aligning product development with the NHS’s focus on redesigned clinical pathways can facilitate smoother market entry and adoption. Additionally, companies must remain attentive to evolving data compliance requirements within the UK’s health sector. Adapting registration and market access strategies to fit this increasingly innovation-friendly policy environment will be essential for leveraging these reforms effectively across European markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["设立 150 万英镑基金加速女性医疗技术采用", "重构更年期等临床路径以提升诊断效率", "推动数字化护理及女性在临床研究中的代表性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Establishment of a £1.5 million Femtech challenge fund to accelerate the adoption of innovative medical technologies.", "Redesign of clinical pathways for menopause and urogynaecology to enhance diagnostic efficiency and patient access.", "Promotion of digital care solutions and improved representation of women in clinical research initiatives."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注英国基金标准以获取早期资本支持", "顺应临床路径改革优化产品市场准入策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor fund application standards to secure early-stage capital and validate technology for market entry.", "Practice note: Align product strategies with clinical pathway reforms to optimize market access and adoption potential.", "What to monitor: Evolving data compliance trends and policy details regarding women's health innovation ecosystems."]
core_points_en: Establishment of a £1.5 million Femtech challenge fund to accelerate the adoption of innovative medical technologies.
Redesign of clinical pathways for menopause and urogynaecology to enhance diagnostic efficiency and patient access.
Promotion of digital care solutions and improved representation of women in clinical research initiatives.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor fund application standards to secure early-stage capital and validate technology for market entry.
Practice note: Align product strategies with clinical pathway reforms to optimize market access and adoption potential.
What to monitor: Evolving data compliance trends and policy details regarding women's health innovation ecosystems.

items.title: AI and Copyright: Symptoms of a Polarized World
items.title_zh: 人工智能与版权：极化世界的症状
items.title_en: AI and Copyright: Navigating Polarization in the European Legal Landscape
items.summary: By Nicolas Le Pays du Teilleul, LL.M. (London), Avocat (Paris), Member, CEIPI Research Laboratory (UR 4375)      As innovation accelerates, the world is becoming more polarized. Generative artificial intelligence (“AI”) clearly reflects this duality. In an environment marked by instability and complexity, action can at times seem impossible. One path remains: understanding. That endeavor is […] L’article AI and Copyright: Symptoms of a Polarized World est apparu en premier sur BLIP! .
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文由巴黎律师撰写，指出生成式人工智能加剧了全球创新环境的极化与复杂性。文章主张在动荡局势中，理解而非盲目行动是应对版权挑战的关键路径。内容聚焦于欧盟及法国视角下，AI 技术发展与传统版权制度之间的深层矛盾，呼吁通过理性分析寻求平衡。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis by Nicolas Le Pays du Teilleul examines how generative artificial intelligence intensifies polarization within the global innovation environment. The author argues that amidst growing instability and complexity, deep understanding of legal and technical conflicts is superior to reactive measures. Focusing on the European Union and French perspectives, the article highlights the profound contradictions between rapid AI technological development and traditional copyright frameworks. It calls for rational analysis to achieve a balanced approach, positioning comprehension as the essential path forward for addressing copyright challenges in this evolving digital era.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局 AI 产品时，需高度关注欧盟版权政策走向。建议提前进行合规评估，避免陷入侵权争议，并积极参与行业标准讨论以应对极化风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants deploying AI products in Europe must closely monitor evolving EU copyright policies regarding training data usage. Proactive compliance assessments are essential to mitigate infringement risks associated with generative content. Engaging in industry standard discussions can help navigate polarized regulatory environments. Rights holders should establish robust internal mechanisms to manage potential liabilities while adapting to the shifting balance between technological advancement and intellectual property protection under current European legal frameworks.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["生成式 AI 反映了创新加速背景下的世界极化现象", "面对不稳定性，深入理解法律与技术冲突优于盲目行动", "文章从欧盟及法国视角剖析 AI 引发的版权制度危机"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Generative AI serves as a clear reflection of world polarization amid accelerating innovation trends.", "Deeply understanding legal and technical conflicts is prioritized over blind action during unstable periods.", "The article analyzes the copyright system crisis triggered by AI from specific EU and French viewpoints."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["密切关注欧盟关于 AI 训练数据版权的立法动态", "建立内部合规机制，防范生成式内容侵权风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor EU legislative dynamics concerning copyright exceptions for AI training data.", "Practice note: Establish internal compliance frameworks to prevent infringement risks in generative outputs.", "What to monitor: Regulatory shifts in EU and French copyright interpretations affecting AI deployment."]
core_points_en: Generative AI serves as a clear reflection of world polarization amid accelerating innovation trends.
Deeply understanding legal and technical conflicts is prioritized over blind action during unstable periods.
The article analyzes the copyright system crisis triggered by AI from specific EU and French viewpoints.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor EU legislative dynamics concerning copyright exceptions for AI training data.
Practice note: Establish internal compliance frameworks to prevent infringement risks in generative outputs.
What to monitor: Regulatory shifts in EU and French copyright interpretations affecting AI deployment.

items.title: Shoosmiths targets tech to aid European expansion
items.title_zh: Shoosmiths 拟借技术手段助力欧洲商标业务扩张
items.title_en: Shoosmiths Leverages Technology to Strengthen European Trademark Practice and Client Services
items.summary: Head of IP, Andrew Brennan, and new partner, France Delord, explain how tech provides an edge in the battle for global brand owners’ business
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国律所 Shoosmiths 知识产权部主管 Andrew Brennan 与新合伙人 France Delord 指出，通过部署先进技术工具，该所旨在提升服务效率，从而在全球品牌所有者的欧洲业务竞争中获取优势。文章重点探讨了技术如何优化商标组合管理及跨境保护流程，反映了法律服务机构在欧洲市场数字化转型的趋势。
items.ai_summary_en: Andrew Brennan, Head of IP at Shoosmiths, alongside new partner France Delord, outlines how the firm utilizes advanced technological tools to enhance service efficiency. This strategic focus aims to secure a competitive advantage in attracting global brand owners seeking robust European representation. The analysis highlights the critical role of technology in optimizing trademark portfolio management and streamlining cross-border protection processes. It reflects a broader industry trend where legal service providers are undergoing digital transformation to meet the evolving demands of international clients. By integrating these innovations, firms seek to deliver faster, more accurate, and cost-effective solutions for complex multinational trademark challenges across the EU jurisdiction.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局商标时，可关注采用数字化工具的律所以提升管理效率。面对欧洲市场竞争加剧，建议企业评估服务商的技术能力，利用数据驱动策略优化海外品牌组合，降低维权成本并快速响应侵权风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders operating in Europe should prioritize evaluating law firms based on their technological infrastructure and data-driven capabilities. Selecting partners with robust digital management systems can significantly enhance the efficiency of brand protection strategies. Leveraging such tools allows for real-time monitoring of infringement activities and optimized portfolio maintenance. This approach helps reduce enforcement costs and enables quicker responses to emerging risks. As competition intensifies, aligning with tech-savvy legal providers ensures that multinational portfolios are managed with greater precision, agility, and strategic foresight in the dynamic European landscape.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Shoosmiths 律所任命新合伙人以强化法国及欧洲业务能力", "强调技术工具在争夺全球品牌客户中的关键竞争优势", "揭示欧洲商标法律服务向数字化与高效化管理转型的趋势"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Shoosmiths appointed a new partner to strengthen its operational capabilities within France and the wider European market.", "The firm emphasizes that deploying advanced technology tools provides a key competitive edge when securing global brand clients.", "The move signals a broader trend toward digitalization and efficient management within European trademark legal services."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["优选具备数字化管理能力的欧洲律所以提升品牌保护效率", "利用技术工具监控欧洲市场侵权动态并优化商标组合策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Prioritize European law firms with proven digital management capabilities to enhance overall brand protection efficiency.", "Practice note: Utilize advanced technical tools to monitor infringement dynamics and optimize strategic trademark portfolio decisions.", "What to monitor: The increasing integration of AI and automation in legal workflows for cross-border trademark enforcement and management."]
core_points_en: Shoosmiths appointed a new partner to strengthen its operational capabilities within France and the wider European market.
The firm emphasizes that deploying advanced technology tools provides a key competitive edge when securing global brand clients.
The move signals a broader trend toward digitalization and efficient management within European trademark legal services.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Prioritize European law firms with proven digital management capabilities to enhance overall brand protection efficiency.
Practice note: Utilize advanced technical tools to monitor infringement dynamics and optimize strategic trademark portfolio decisions.
What to monitor: The increasing integration of AI and automation in legal workflows for cross-border trademark enforcement and management.

items.title: Pourquoi les innovations végétales nécessitent-elles une stratégie de propriété intellectuelle multidimensionnelle ?
items.title_zh: 为何植物创新需要多维度的知识产权策略？
items.title_en: Why Plant Innovations Require a Multidimensional Intellectual Property Strategy
items.summary: Introduction  L’innovation végétale occupe aujourd’hui une place stratégique à l’intersection de l’agriculture, de la sécurité alimentaire et de la transition climatique. Sélection variétale, biotechnologies, édition génomique ou encore optimisation des intrants : ces avancées reposent sur des investissements lourds, des cycles de développement longs et un environnement concurrentiel globalisé. Lorsqu’on
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文指出植物创新处于农业、粮食安全与气候转型交汇点，依赖巨额投资与长周期研发。面对全球化竞争，单一保护模式不足，需构建结合专利、植物新品种权及商业秘密的多维 IP 策略，以应对基因编辑等新技术挑战并保障投资回报。
items.ai_summary_en: Plant innovation sits at the critical intersection of agriculture, food security, and climate transition. Advancements in varietal selection, biotechnology, genomic editing, and input optimization rely on substantial investments and long development cycles within a globalized competitive landscape. Relying on a single protection model is insufficient for securing returns. Rights holders must construct a multidimensional intellectual property strategy that integrates patents, plant variety rights, and trade secrets. This approach is essential to address compliance challenges posed by new technologies like gene editing while ensuring robust protection across international markets. Such a comprehensive framework allows market participants to navigate complex regulatory environments and maximize the commercial value of their agricultural innovations effectively.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国农企出海欧洲应摒弃单一申请模式，统筹专利与 UPOV 体系布局。针对基因编辑性状，需提前评估欧盟监管口径，利用组合策略规避侵权风险并最大化商业价值。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants expanding into Europe should move beyond single-mode filing approaches. It is crucial to coordinate patent filings with UPOV system registrations to create a cohesive protection portfolio. For traits derived from gene editing, early assessment of European Union regulatory stances is vital. By leveraging a combined IP strategy, rights holders can mitigate infringement risks and maximize commercial value. This proactive alignment ensures that both technical inventions and biological varieties are adequately protected under current legal frameworks, supporting sustainable investment returns in the European agricultural sector.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["植物创新需融合专利与品种权构建多维保护网", "基因编辑等新技术对现有 IP 制度提出合规挑战", "全球化竞争要求企业制定长期且灵活的 IP 战略"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Integrate patents and plant variety rights to build a comprehensive protective network for plant innovations.", "New technologies such as gene editing present significant compliance challenges to existing intellectual property regimes.", "Global competition requires companies to develop long-term and flexible intellectual property strategies."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["统筹专利与品种权，构建植物创新组合护城河", "预判欧盟基因编辑监管，动态调整海外布局策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Coordinate patents and variety rights to establish a strong defensive moat for plant innovations.", "Practice note: Anticipate EU gene editing regulations and dynamically adjust overseas layout strategies accordingly.", "What to monitor: Evolving EU regulatory interpretations regarding gene-edited plant traits and their IP eligibility."]
core_points_en: Integrate patents and plant variety rights to build a comprehensive protective network for plant innovations.
New technologies such as gene editing present significant compliance challenges to existing intellectual property regimes.
Global competition requires companies to develop long-term and flexible intellectual property strategies.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Coordinate patents and variety rights to establish a strong defensive moat for plant innovations.
Practice note: Anticipate EU gene editing regulations and dynamically adjust overseas layout strategies accordingly.
What to monitor: Evolving EU regulatory interpretations regarding gene-edited plant traits and their IP eligibility.

items.title_zh: 域名保护：如何在数字空间通过预留与诉讼捍卫商标权
items.title_en: Noms de domaine : réservation, surveillance et litiges, comment protéger votre marque dans l’espace numérique
items.summary: En 2025, le Centre d’arbitrage et de médiation de l’OMPI a enregistré un nombre record de 6 282 plaintes liées aux noms de domaine, soit une hausse de 1,8 % par rapport à 2024. Derrière cette statistique, une réalité concrète : chaque jour, des entreprises, PME comme groupes internationaux, voient
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文指出 2025 年 WIPO 仲裁中心域名投诉量创历史新高，达 6282 起，同比增长 1.8%。文章强调各类企业日益面临域名抢注风险，并深入探讨在数字空间中通过域名预留、持续监控及争议解决机制来保护商标品牌的综合策略，旨在为企业应对网络侵权提供实务指引。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业应高度重视域名资产布局，提前在重点市场进行防御性注册。面对频发的域名争议，建议建立专项监控体系，熟悉 WIPO 等仲裁规则，以便在遭遇抢注时能迅速启动法律程序，降低品牌在欧数字化运营风险。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年 WIPO 域名争议案件数量攀升，反映网络品牌侵权高发态势", "企业需建立域名预留与实时监测机制，以防患于未然", "利用仲裁与诉讼手段是解决域名纠纷、维护商标权益的关键路径"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["强化域名防御性注册策略，构建品牌数字护城河", "熟练掌握国际仲裁规则，提升跨境域名维权响应速度"]

items.title: AI in the patent industry: Don't believe the hype. Believe the data.
items.title_zh: 专利业中的 AI：勿信炒作，唯信数据
items.title_en: AI in the Patent Industry: Prioritizing Empirical Data Over Professional Skepticism
items.summary: Many in the IP profession remain considerably sceptical of AI. AI may be useful for checking for typos and simple calculations of deadlines, but it cannot replace in-depth human reasoning about complex scientific and legal issues. However, the data suggests something different. How do we know LLMs are any good? Generative AI is an exceedingly competitive field. It is possibly one of the
items.ai_summary_zh: 文章指出知识产权界对 AI 普遍持怀疑态度，认为其仅能处理校对等简单任务，无法替代复杂法律推理。然而，数据显示生成式 AI 领域竞争激烈且大语言模型表现优异，暗示其在专利实务中的潜力可能超出传统认知，呼吁以数据而非偏见评估 AI 价值。
items.ai_summary_en: The intellectual property profession remains largely skeptical regarding artificial intelligence, often viewing it as limited to basic tasks like typo correction and deadline calculations. Critics argue that AI cannot replicate the deep human reasoning required for complex scientific and legal issues. However, emerging data challenges this conventional wisdom. The generative AI sector is highly competitive, driving rapid advancements in large language models (LLMs). Performance metrics indicate that these tools are achieving significant capabilities beyond simple automation. This discrepancy between professional perception and empirical evidence suggests that AI’s potential in patent practice may be substantially underestimated. Stakeholders are urged to evaluate AI utility based on objective performance data rather than entrenched biases or traditional assumptions about its limitations.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利布局应关注 AI 工具的实际效能数据，适时引入辅助检索与分析，但需保留人工复核机制以应对复杂法律判断，避免过度依赖或盲目排斥新技术。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should assess AI tools through rigorous validation of actual efficacy data rather than dismissing them due to inherent skepticism. Integrating verified AI solutions can significantly enhance efficiency in patent retrieval and preliminary screening processes. However, given the nuanced nature of patent law, organizations must maintain robust human oversight mechanisms. Final decisions on complex technical and legal matters should remain under human control to ensure accuracy and strategic alignment. This balanced approach allows firms to leverage technological advantages while mitigating risks associated with over-reliance on automated systems, ensuring a pragmatic adoption strategy.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["IP 界普遍质疑 AI 仅适用于简单任务而非复杂推理", "现有数据表明大语言模型在竞争激烈的领域中表现优异", "呼吁行业依据实证数据而非固有偏见来评估 AI 效用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["IP professionals widely doubt AI's ability to handle complex legal reasoning, restricting its perceived role to routine administrative tasks.", "Competitive market dynamics drive rapid LLM improvements, with data showing performance levels that exceed current industry expectations.", "Evaluating AI value requires relying on empirical performance metrics rather than subjective professional skepticism or traditional prejudices."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用数据验证的 AI 工具提升专利检索与初筛效率", "坚持人工深度介入复杂法律与技术问题的最终决策"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage empirically validated AI tools to improve efficiency in patent retrieval and initial case screening.", "Practice note: Maintain mandatory human review for final decisions on complex legal and technical issues to ensure quality control.", "What to monitor: Track evolving performance benchmarks of large language models to identify suitable integration points in workflows."]
core_points_en: IP professionals widely doubt AI's ability to handle complex legal reasoning, restricting its perceived role to routine administrative tasks.
Competitive market dynamics drive rapid LLM improvements, with data showing performance levels that exceed current industry expectations.
Evaluating AI value requires relying on empirical performance metrics rather than subjective professional skepticism or traditional prejudices.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage empirically validated AI tools to improve efficiency in patent retrieval and initial case screening.
Practice note: Maintain mandatory human review for final decisions on complex legal and technical issues to ensure quality control.
What to monitor: Track evolving performance benchmarks of large language models to identify suitable integration points in workflows.

items.title: Temu joins IACC amid suits, probes and scrutiny
items.title_zh: Temu  amid 诉讼与审查加入国际反假冒联盟
items.title_en: Temu Joins IACC Amid Global Infringement Lawsuits and Regulatory Scrutiny
items.summary: Fast-growing Chinese online marketplace joins anti-counterfeiting coalition as it faces infringement lawsuits and regulatory scrutiny worldwide.
items.ai_summary_zh: 中国跨境电商平台 Temu 在面临全球范围内的侵权诉讼及监管审查背景下，正式加入国际反假冒联盟（IACC）。此举旨在应对其快速增长带来的知识产权合规挑战，通过参与行业自律组织来缓解外界对其平台上假冒商品泛滥的担忧，并试图改善其在欧美等主要市场的法律与舆论环境。
items.ai_summary_en: Fast-growing cross-border e-commerce platform Temu has officially joined the International AntiCounterfeiting Coalition (IACC). This strategic move occurs as the marketplace faces increasing infringement lawsuits and regulatory scrutiny worldwide. The decision aims to address intellectual property compliance challenges driven by its rapid expansion. By participating in this industry self-regulatory organization, Temu seeks to alleviate external concerns regarding counterfeit goods on its platform. Furthermore, the membership is intended to improve its legal and public opinion environment in key markets such as Europe and the United States, demonstrating a commitment to combating counterfeiting amidst heightened enforcement pressures.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业应重视国际行业组织的合规价值，主动加入相关联盟可作为一种风险缓释手段。同时，必须建立实质性的事前审核机制，避免仅将加入组织视为公关策略，以应对日益严苛的欧洲知识产权执法环境。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should recognize the compliance value of international industry organizations. Proactively joining relevant alliances can serve as an effective risk mitigation strategy. However, mere formal membership is insufficient; companies must establish substantive pre-screening mechanisms for goods. Relying solely on organizational affiliation as a public relations tactic is inadequate against increasingly stringent European intellectual property enforcement. Demonstrating genuine operational controls over counterfeit goods is essential for maintaining legal standing and reputation in regulated jurisdictions.

items.title: Buchrezension: "Don KI-jote" Von Römermann & Kümmerle
items.title_zh: 书评：《唐吉诃德与 AI》——法律人的新定位
items.title_en: Review: Don KI-jote Urges Legal Professionals to Master AI Rather Than Resist It
items.summary: Das ist mein Startpunkt: ich kenne Prof. Dr. Volker Römermann seit er an unserem "1st World "Robot Patent Drafting Symposium" (click hier) als Sprecher teilgenommen hat.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文评述 Römermann 与 Kümmerle 新作，以欧盟新施行的 AI 法规为背景，警示德国法律及税务专家勿做对抗技术的“唐吉诃德”。书中指出 AI 已能胜任检索等基础任务，打破知识垄断，呼吁从业者从“知识管理员”转型为“信任架构师”，强调战略思维与伦理判断的未来价值。
items.ai_summary_en: This review examines the new book by Professors Römermann and Kümmerle, set against the backdrop of the recently enacted EU AI Act. The authors warn German legal and tax experts against becoming modern-day Don Quixotes who futilely fight against technological progress. Instead, they argue that AI capabilities in tasks like legal research have dismantled the traditional knowledge monopoly long held by these professions. The text calls for a fundamental shift in professional identity, moving from mere 'knowledge managers' to 'trust architects.' It emphasizes that future value lies in strategic thinking, ethical judgment, and overseeing AI-driven processes, urging practitioners to master the new technological landscape rather than resist it.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧需关注 AI 对法律服务模式的重塑，利用 AI 工具提升合规效率。同时应重视数据伦理与人工复核，避免过度依赖自动化，确保在复杂监管环境中保持战略主动权。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in Europe should monitor how AI integration reshapes legal service models and compliance workflows. Leveraging AI tools can enhance efficiency in intellectual property management and regulatory adherence. However, firms must maintain robust human-in-the-loop mechanisms for ethical review and quality control. Over-reliance on automation poses risks in complex regulatory environments. Ensuring human oversight preserves strategic autonomy and mitigates liability, allowing companies to navigate evolving AI governance frameworks effectively while optimizing operational performance.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟 AI 法规施行促使法律行业反思职业定位", "AI 技术突破削弱传统法律服务的知识垄断优势", "未来专家价值在于战略决策而非单纯知识管理"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EU AI Act implementation prompts critical reflection on professional roles within the European legal sector.", "AI advancements in research and analysis significantly weaken the traditional knowledge monopoly of legal services.", "Future expert value depends on strategic decision-making and ethical oversight rather than simple information management."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用 AI 工具优化欧洲知识产权合规流程", "坚守人工伦理审查以应对复杂法律风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Utilize AI tools to optimize European IP compliance processes and reduce administrative burdens.", "Practice note: Maintain strict human ethical reviews to address complex legal risks associated with automated decisions.", "What to monitor: Evolving interpretations of the EU AI Act regarding liability and professional responsibility in legal tech."]
core_points_en: The EU AI Act implementation prompts critical reflection on professional roles within the European legal sector.
AI advancements in research and analysis significantly weaken the traditional knowledge monopoly of legal services.
Future expert value depends on strategic decision-making and ethical oversight rather than simple information management.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Utilize AI tools to optimize European IP compliance processes and reduce administrative burdens.
Practice note: Maintain strict human ethical reviews to address complex legal risks associated with automated decisions.
What to monitor: Evolving interpretations of the EU AI Act regarding liability and professional responsibility in legal tech.

items.title: How Metaphors Can Make or Break AI Copyright Cases
items.title_zh: 隐喻如何决定生成式 AI 版权案件成败
items.title_en: How Metaphors Shape Outcomes in Generative AI Copyright Disputes
items.summary: Metaphors are crucial to our (mis)understanding of generative AI (GenAI). For instance, AI is systematically conceptualized in human terms such as neural networks that learn, know and memorize. This blog briefly demonstrates how such metaphors resonate in AI copyright disputes and may affect their outcomes.
items.ai_summary_zh: 文章分析“学习”、“记忆”等拟人化隐喻如何左右生成式 AI 版权纠纷。通过对比美国两起相反判决，指出将训练比作人类阅读可导向合理使用，而视作产品制造则可能构成侵权。该逻辑对欧盟界定文本数据挖掘例外及判定模型输出责任具有关键参考意义。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines how anthropomorphic metaphors, such as 'learning' and 'memory,' influence the adjudication of generative AI copyright disputes. By contrasting two divergent US judgments, it highlights that framing training as analogous to human reading tends to support fair use defenses, whereas characterizing it as manufacturing may lead to infringement findings. This logical framework holds significant reference value for European Union legal practitioners. It is particularly relevant when defining the scope of text and data mining exceptions and determining liability for model outputs. The piece underscores that the choice of metaphor directly affects the weighting of key factors in fairness tests, specifically regarding the nature of the use and its impact on potential markets.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局 AI 时，应避免在合规论证中使用易引发“替代创作”联想的表述。建议借鉴“人类阅读”类比构建抗辩逻辑，强调训练的转化性与非竞争性，以契合欧盟版权法对文本数据挖掘的宽容趋势。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants developing AI systems should carefully structure their compliance narratives to emphasize transformative use. Arguments should avoid language that suggests direct competition or the replacement of original creative works, which could trigger negative legal presumptions. Instead, leveraging analogies to human learning processes can help align defense strategies with the evolving interpretation of text and data mining exceptions under EU copyright law. This approach aims to maximize the applicability of statutory exceptions by highlighting the non-competitive and transformative nature of model training activities.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["拟人化隐喻如“学习”和“记忆”是理解与裁决 AI 版权案的关键变量", "美国判例显示：视训练为阅读倾向合理使用，视其为制造则倾向侵权", "隐喻选择直接决定公平使用测试中“使用性质”与“市场影响”因素的权重"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Anthropomorphic metaphors like learning and memory serve as critical variables in understanding and ruling on AI copyright cases.", "US case law indicates that viewing training as reading favors fair use, while treating it as manufacturing leans toward infringement.", "The selected metaphor directly determines the weight assigned to the nature of use and market impact within fairness assessments."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["合规叙事应侧重“转化性使用”，避免强化“直接竞争”或“替代创作”印象", "利用“人类学习”类比争取欧盟文本数据挖掘例外条款的最大化适用空间"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Compliance narratives must prioritize transformative use arguments while avoiding implications of direct competition or creative substitution.", "Practice note: Utilize human learning analogies to construct robust defenses aimed at maximizing the application of EU text and data mining exception clauses.", "What to monitor: Judicial interpretations of metaphors in pending AI copyright litigation and their impact on the scope of data mining exceptions."]
core_points_en: Anthropomorphic metaphors like learning and memory serve as critical variables in understanding and ruling on AI copyright cases.
US case law indicates that viewing training as reading favors fair use, while treating it as manufacturing leans toward infringement.
The selected metaphor directly determines the weight assigned to the nature of use and market impact within fairness assessments.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Compliance narratives must prioritize transformative use arguments while avoiding implications of direct competition or creative substitution.
Practice note: Utilize human learning analogies to construct robust defenses aimed at maximizing the application of EU text and data mining exception clauses.
What to monitor: Judicial interpretations of metaphors in pending AI copyright litigation and their impact on the scope of data mining exceptions.

items.title: Le naming d’infrastructures face au droit d’auteur : quels enseignements tirés de la décision du 4 septembre 2025 du TJ de Toulon ?
items.title_zh: 土伦法院判决：基础设施命名面临的著作权挑战
items.title_en: Toulon Court Ruling: Copyright Risks in Infrastructure Naming and Sponsorship Deals
items.summary: Introduction Le naming, ou « nommage », consiste à attribuer un nom ou une marque à un lieu, un bâtiment ou un équipement, souvent dans un cadre commercial ou de partenariat (par exemple, donner le nom d’une entreprise à un stade ou à une salle). Cette pratique est un véritable
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析法国土伦高等法院 2025 年 9 月 4 日关于基础设施命名的判决。文章探讨将企业名称用于体育场等建筑的商业实践（命名权），在何种情况下会侵犯建筑作品或相关设计的著作权，并提炼该判决对商业合作中品牌露出的法律警示。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines the September 4, 2025 judgment from the Toulon Judicial Court regarding the intersection of infrastructure naming rights and copyright law. The practice of 'naming,' which involves assigning a corporate name or brand to buildings like stadiums for commercial partnerships, is scrutinized for potential infringement of architectural works. The article explores the legal boundaries where commercial branding may violate the moral or economic rights associated with protected building designs. It highlights how courts assess whether such naming constitutes an unauthorized adaptation or distortion of the original architectural creation, offering critical guidance on balancing commercial sponsorship interests with strict intellectual property protections under French law.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧进行体育场馆或地标建筑赞助冠名时，须前置审查建筑设计著作权状态。建议在合作协议中明确知识产权免责条款，避免因命名行为卷入侵权诉讼，影响品牌声誉及商业利益。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants engaging in stadium or landmark naming deals must conduct preliminary due diligence on the copyright status of the underlying architectural designs. Rights holders should ensure that sponsorship contracts include clear clauses addressing intellectual property liabilities and indemnification mechanisms. This proactive approach helps mitigate the risk of infringement litigation, which could damage brand reputation and disrupt commercial operations. Legal teams should verify ownership of design rights before finalizing agreements to avoid unintended violations of authors' moral rights.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["界定商业命名行为与著作权侵权的法律边界", "解析土伦法院对建筑作品保护范围的具体认定", "揭示企业赞助冠名中潜在的知识产权合规风险"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Defining the legal boundary between commercial naming practices and copyright infringement of architectural works.", "Analyzing the Toulon Court's specific determination regarding the scope of protection afforded to building designs.", "Revealing potential intellectual property compliance risks inherent in corporate sponsorship and naming agreements."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["赞助冠名前需尽职调查建筑作品著作权归属", "合同中应设定知识产权侵权的责任分担机制"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Conduct thorough due diligence on architectural copyright ownership prior to finalizing sponsorship naming agreements.", "Practice note: Establish explicit liability sharing and indemnification mechanisms for IP infringement within commercial contracts.", "What to monitor: Evolving judicial interpretations of architectural work protection scopes in the context of commercial branding."]
core_points_en: Defining the legal boundary between commercial naming practices and copyright infringement of architectural works.
Analyzing the Toulon Court's specific determination regarding the scope of protection afforded to building designs.
Revealing potential intellectual property compliance risks inherent in corporate sponsorship and naming agreements.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Conduct thorough due diligence on architectural copyright ownership prior to finalizing sponsorship naming agreements.
Practice note: Establish explicit liability sharing and indemnification mechanisms for IP infringement within commercial contracts.
What to monitor: Evolving judicial interpretations of architectural work protection scopes in the context of commercial branding.

items.title: LA RESPONSABILITÉ PERSONNELLE DU DIRIGEANT EN MATIÈRE DE CONTREFAÇON DE LOGICIELS
items.title_zh: 软件侵权中企业高管的个人法律责任
items.title_en: French Court Ruling: Personal Liability of Executives for Corporate Software Copyright Infringement
items.summary: Par Benjamin MOUROT, avocat associé au cabinet Bignon Lebray Le jugement rendu par le Tribunal judiciaire de Rennes le 12 janvier 2026 s’inscrit dans une évolution jurisprudentielle ouvrant la voie à l’engagement direct de la responsabilité patrimoniale personnelle d’un dirigeant ayant toléré ou participé à l’utilisation illicite de copies de logiciels au sein de la société […] L’article LA RESPONSABILITÉ PERSONNELLE DU DIRIGEANT EN MATIÈRE DE CONTREFAÇON DE LOGICIELS est apparu en premier sur B
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析雷恩司法法院 2026 年 1 月 12 日判决，该判例标志 jurisprudence 演变，允许直接追究容忍或参与公司内部非法使用软件副本的高管个人财产责任。文章指出，若高管明知侵权仍放任或直接参与，其个人资产将面临赔偿风险，突破了传统公司有限责任保护屏障。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines the judgment delivered by the Judicial Court of Rennes on January 12, 2026, which marks a significant evolution in French case law. The ruling establishes that corporate executives may face direct personal financial liability if they tolerated or actively participated in the illicit use of unauthorized software copies within their company. This decision pierces the traditional corporate veil, exposing individual assets to compensation claims when managers knowingly allow infringement to occur. It signals a stricter judicial approach toward holding leadership personally accountable for intellectual property violations committed under their watch, moving beyond standard corporate limited liability protections.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中企需严审软件合规，避免高管因管理疏忽承担无限连带责任。建议建立严格软件资产审计机制，明确管理层合规义务，防止因个别侵权行为波及个人资产安全。
items.ai_insight_en: Client relevance: Organizations operating in France must recognize that corporate structures no longer automatically insulate leaders from copyright infringement consequences. Personal exposure is now a tangible risk for executives overseeing non-compliant software usage. Practice note: Companies should implement rigorous software asset management audits and define clear compliance obligations for management layers. Establishing internal accountability mechanisms helps prevent individual liability arising from operational negligence. What to monitor: Monitor further developments in French jurisprudence regarding executive liability for IP infringements. Track whether other EU jurisdictions adopt similar approaches to piercing the corporate veil in copyright cases involving software licensing violations.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["雷恩法院判决开启追究高管个人财产责任先河", "高管容忍或参与非法软件使用将致个人担责", "司法实践突破公司面纱直指管理者个人"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Rennes court judgment sets a precedent for directly pursuing the personal patrimonial liability of corporate executives involved in software infringement.", "Executives who tolerate or participate in the illegal use of software copies within their organization risk facing personal financial responsibility and asset seizure.", "Judicial practice is evolving to bypass corporate limited liability shields, targeting management individuals directly for copyright violations."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["高管需警惕软件侵权引发的个人连带赔偿风险", "在欧企业应构建软件合规审计与问责防火墙"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Executives must be aware of growing personal joint liability risks stemming from corporate software copyright infringement.", "Practice note: Companies should construct robust software compliance audit frameworks and accountability firewalls to protect individual assets.", "What to monitor: Watch for broader adoption of personal executive liability standards for IP violations across European jurisdictions."]
core_points_en: The Rennes court judgment sets a precedent for directly pursuing the personal patrimonial liability of corporate executives involved in software infringement.
Executives who tolerate or participate in the illegal use of software copies within their organization risk facing personal financial responsibility and asset seizure.
Judicial practice is evolving to bypass corporate limited liability shields, targeting management individuals directly for copyright violations.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Executives must be aware of growing personal joint liability risks stemming from corporate software copyright infringement.
Practice note: Companies should construct robust software compliance audit frameworks and accountability firewalls to protect individual assets.
What to monitor: Watch for broader adoption of personal executive liability standards for IP violations across European jurisdictions.

items.title: Description amendments: unchanged? - Carpmaels & Ransford - Law Firm
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利说明书修改：规则是否生变？
items.title_en: Description amendments: unchanged? - Carpmaels & Ransford - Law Firm
items.summary: The amendment of the description in line with the claims has been a long-standing feature of patent prosecution and opposition practice at the EPO. Applicants are routinely required to amend the description to remove, reword, or disclaim parts of the description to remove any subject-matter that may imply that the patent protects embodiments which are […]
items.ai_summary_zh: 针对欧洲专利局长期要求的“说明书需与权利要求一致”的惯例，扩大上诉委员会就 G1/25 案发布初步意见。该案源于技术上诉委员会对法律依据的分歧。初步意见倾向于认为，若不一致导致不符合公约，则必须修改说明书，但尚未明确具体判定标准，最终结论待决。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利申请应高度重视说明书撰写质量，避免埋下不一致隐患。在应对审查或异议时，需预判扩大上诉委员会的最终裁决，提前准备说明书修改策略，以防因形式瑕疵导致权利范围受限或专利无效风险。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧专局扩大上诉委员会发布 G1/25 案初步意见，倾向维持说明书一致性要求", "案件核心在于厘清《欧洲专利公约》是否强制要求消除权利要求与描述的不一致", "初步意见区分了导致违规与未导致违规的不一致情形，但具体界定尚待明确"]

items.title: All UPC judges and their current capacities
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院全体法官名单及现任职权一览
items.title_en: All UPC judges and their current capacities
items.summary: The roster of judges at the UPC is steadily growing. While there were 124 legally and technically qualified judges in mid-2025, by the end of the year that number had already risen to 129. By March 2026, the number of judges had increased by another five as Thomas Adocker, Goda Ambrasaité-Balyniené, Ingo Rinken, Ina Schurr, […] The post All UPC judges and their current capacities appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）法官队伍持续扩张，从 2025 年中期的 124 人增至年底的 129 人，并于 2026 年 3 月再增 5 人。文章详细列出了包括 Thomas Adocker 在内的最新任命法官名单及其当前履职状态，反映了 UPC 为应对案件增长而加强司法资源配置的最新动态。
items.ai_insight_zh: 法官扩容预示 UPC 案件处理能力提升，可能导致诉讼周期缩短或受理量增加。在欧中国企业需关注新法官背景，评估其对特定技术领域案件的潜在倾向，并据此优化诉讼策略与风险防控机制。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC 法官总数从 2025 年中至 2026 年 3 月显著增长，新增多名法律与技术…", "文章提供了截至 2026 年 3 月的完整法官名单及其具体任职容量状态", "法官队伍的扩充旨在提升法院审理能力，以应对日益增加的专利诉讼案件"]

items.title: Sequence identities and functional definitions - where is the limit? (T 0137/24)
items.title_zh: 序列同一性与功能定义：界限何在？
items.title_en: Sequence Identities and Functional Definitions: Where Is the Limit? (T 0137/24)
items.summary: Biotechnology patents often rely on defining protein and nucleic acid features by their sequence identity. However, it is often not necessary to define the exact sequence, but instead to define the sequence according to a limit of sequence identity, e.g. a sequence having a 90% sequence identity to a specified sequence. Prosecuting such applications is often about finding the limit of sequence
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析欧洲专利局上诉委员会案件 T 0137/24，探讨生物技术专利中利用序列同一性（如 90% 相似度）而非精确序列来定义蛋白质或核酸特征的法律界限。文章指出，专利申请与审查的关键在于确定序列同一性的合理阈值，以平衡保护范围与充分公开要求，避免权利要求因涵盖未知功能变体而被认定无效。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines European Patent Office Board of Appeal case T 0137/24, addressing the legal boundaries for defining protein or nucleic acid features via sequence identity rather than exact sequences in biotechnology patents. The article highlights that a critical aspect of patent prosecution involves establishing reasonable thresholds for sequence identity to balance protection scope with sufficiency of disclosure requirements. This approach aims to prevent claims from being invalidated due to covering unknown functional variants. The decision clarifies the intersection between functional definitions and sequence characteristics, offering guidance on how applicants can effectively define biological inventions without overreaching into unverified subject matter.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国生物医药企业在欧申请专利时，需谨慎设定序列同一性阈值，避免因范围过宽被驳回或无效。建议结合具体实验数据支持功能性限定，并密切关注 EPO 对此类案件的审查趋势，优化权利要求布局以提升授权稳定性。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders should carefully calibrate sequence identity thresholds during European patent applications to mitigate risks of rejection or invalidation due to excessive breadth. It is advisable to support functional limitations with robust experimental data to satisfy sufficiency of disclosure requirements. Additionally, stakeholders must closely monitor evolving EPO examination trends regarding sequence-based claims. Optimizing claim layouts by aligning with current judicial interpretations will enhance the stability and enforceability of granted biotechnology patents across European jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["生物专利常依序列同一性而非精确序列界定保护范围", "审查核心在于确立序列相似度的合法上限以避免过度宽泛", "案件 T 0137/24 明确了功能定义与序列特征结合的法律边界"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Biotechnology patents frequently rely on sequence identity percentages rather than exact sequences to define the scope of protection for biological molecules.", "The core examination challenge lies in establishing lawful upper limits for sequence similarity to avoid claims that are excessively broad or unsupported.", "Case T 0137/24 clarifies the legal boundaries when combining functional definitions with specific sequence characteristics in patent claims."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["设定序列相似度阈值需有充分实验数据支撑以防无效", "应动态跟踪 EPO 审查标准以优化生物技术专利布局"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Establish sequence similarity thresholds supported by sufficient experimental data to prevent invalidation risks.", "Practice note: Dynamically track EPO examination standards to optimize biotechnology patent layouts and ensure compliance.", "What to monitor: Evolving case law regarding the interplay between functional definitions and sequence identity limits."]
core_points_en: Biotechnology patents frequently rely on sequence identity percentages rather than exact sequences to define the scope of protection for biological molecules.
The core examination challenge lies in establishing lawful upper limits for sequence similarity to avoid claims that are excessively broad or unsupported.
Case T 0137/24 clarifies the legal boundaries when combining functional definitions with specific sequence characteristics in patent claims.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Establish sequence similarity thresholds supported by sufficient experimental data to prevent invalidation risks.
Practice note: Dynamically track EPO examination standards to optimize biotechnology patent layouts and ensure compliance.
What to monitor: Evolving case law regarding the interplay between functional definitions and sequence identity limits.

items.title: Cost decision overturned on appeal
items.title_zh: 上诉推翻费用决定：已报销款项可在后续程序中追回
items.title_en: UPC Cost Decision Overturned on Appeal: Recovering Previously Reimbursed Sums
items.summary: Case: Seoul Viosys v expert e-Commerce / expert klein – Local Division Düsseldorf, 10 April 2026 (UPC_CFI_1110/2025; UPC_CFI_1111/2025)
items.ai_summary_zh: 杜塞尔多夫地方分院审理首尔 Viosys 案时裁定，若一审费用决定已执行但后被上诉法院推翻，原决定即失法律基础。当事人可在后续费用程序中追回已支付款项，该款项被视为可回收诉讼成本的一部分。同时法院明确一审费用协议不自动延伸至上诉阶段。
items.ai_summary_en: In Seoul Viosys v expert e-Commerce, the UPC Düsseldorf Local Division addressed the procedural consequences when a first-instance cost decision is enforced but subsequently overturned on appeal. The Court held that once the appellate court reverses the underlying judgment and alters the costs order, the initial cost-fixing decision loses its legal basis. Consequently, any amounts already reimbursed to the prevailing party under the earlier decision may be reclaimed in subsequent cost proceedings. These recovered sums are treated as part of the recoverable procedural costs. This ruling clarifies that rights holders cannot retain cost reimbursements if the final appellate outcome shifts liability, ensuring that cost allocation reflects the ultimate judicial determination across all instances.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在 UPC 诉讼中需警惕费用风险的动态变化。即便一审胜诉并获赔，若二审翻盘仍面临退费风险。建议预留资金应对潜在返还义务，并在各审级单独协商费用上限，避免默认协议覆盖范围不足。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision highlights the financial volatility inherent in multi-instance UPC litigation. Parties who secure favorable cost orders at first instance face potential repayment obligations if the appellate court reverses the substantive outcome. Litigants should maintain liquidity reserves to cover possible refunds rather than treating interim cost awards as final gains. Furthermore, parties must negotiate cost caps or funding arrangements separately for each procedural stage. Relying on first-instance agreements to cover appellate expenses creates exposure, as such terms do not automatically apply to higher instance proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉推翻原判后，基于原判决已支付的费用可依法追回", "追回款项被确认为后续费用程序中可回收的诉讼成本", "一审达成的费用限额协议不自动适用于上诉审理阶段"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Costs paid under an initial decision must be returned if the underlying judgment is fully reversed on appeal.", "Reclaimed amounts constitute recoverable procedural costs within the subsequent cost-fixing proceedings.", "First-instance cost agreements do not automatically extend to cover costs incurred during appellate proceedings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["二审翻盘可能导致已获赔费用被强制追回，需预留资金", "各审级费用协议需单独签署，防止一审约定误延至上诉"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Interim cost awards are provisional; funds may need to be returned if the appellate court reverses the infringement finding.", "Practice note: Negotiate distinct cost limits or funding agreements for first instance and appeal stages to avoid coverage gaps.", "What to monitor: Appellate developments that alter the foundational basis of previously enforced cost-fixing decisions."]
core_points_en: Costs paid under an initial decision must be returned if the underlying judgment is fully reversed on appeal.
Reclaimed amounts constitute recoverable procedural costs within the subsequent cost-fixing proceedings.
First-instance cost agreements do not automatically extend to cover costs incurred during appellate proceedings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Interim cost awards are provisional; funds may need to be returned if the appellate court reverses the infringement finding.
Practice note: Negotiate distinct cost limits or funding agreements for first instance and appeal stages to avoid coverage gaps.
What to monitor: Appellate developments that alter the foundational basis of previously enforced cost-fixing decisions.
