items.title: Trademark Registration For Musicians: The Overlooked Tool To Protect Your Brand
items.title_zh: 音乐人商标：被忽视的品牌保护工具
items.title_en: Trademark Registration for Musicians: An Overlooked Brand Protection Tool
items.summary: For many musicians, intellectual property protection begins and ends with copyright. Copyright law is widely understood in the music industry as the legal framework that protects songs, lyrics, recordings, and other creative works. While copyright is important, it is far from the only tool available to artists seeking to protect their brand and livelihood.
items.ai_summary_zh: 文章指出音乐行业过度依赖版权，忽视了商标对乐队名、周边商品等商业标识的保护。随着全球电商平台兴起，假冒商品泛滥，如MF Doom起诉Temu案。商标成为打击侵权、维护品牌控制权的核心法律工具。建议音乐人通过商标注册防止身份被滥用，并在遭遇仿冒时采取法律行动。
items.ai_summary_en: The article highlights that the music industry often relies excessively on copyright, neglecting trademark protection for band names and merchandise. Copyright does not cover commercial identifiers like logos or tour names, which fall under trademark law. With the rise of global e-commerce, counterfeit goods have proliferated due to insufficient platform oversight, severely damaging artists' brand equity. Recent legal actions, such as MF Doom’s lawsuit against Temu, illustrate the critical role of trademarks in combating infringement. Registering trademarks is essential for establishing source identification, enabling rights holders to request takedowns of infringing links and claim damages. Artists are advised to secure trademark registrations to prevent identity misuse and take legal action against counterfeits to maintain control over their brands.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国音乐IP出海应构建“版权+商标”双重壁垒，重点注册核心艺人名及周边类别。针对Temu等平台售假，需建立常态化监测机制，利用商标权快速投诉下架。企业应重视品牌资产确权，避免因缺乏商标保护而在国际维权中陷入被动。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders should construct a dual protection framework combining copyright and trademarks, prioritizing registration for core artist names and merchandise categories. Given the prevalence of counterfeit sales on platforms like Temu, establishing routine monitoring mechanisms is crucial. Trademark rights enable rapid complaints and takedowns of infringing listings. Companies must prioritize the confirmation of brand asset rights to avoid passive positions in international enforcement. Proactive trademark strategy ensures effective defense against unauthorized use and secures commercial interests in global markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["版权无法保护乐队名和周边商品，需依靠商标法确立商业来源识别", "跨境电商平台监管缺失导致假冒周边泛滥，严重损害艺人品牌权益", "注册商标是打击仿冒、要求下架侵权链接及索赔的关键法律依据"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Copyright fails to protect band names and merchandise, necessitating trademark law to establish commercial source identification.", "Lack of regulation on cross-border e-commerce platforms leads to rampant counterfeit merchandise, severely harming artist brand rights.", "Trademark registration serves as the key legal basis for combating counterfeits, requesting takedowns of infringing links, and claiming damages."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["构建版权与商标双重保护体系，重点覆盖周边商品类别", "建立电商平台监测机制，利用商标权快速打击跨境售假行为"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Establish a dual protection system covering copyright and trademarks, with specific focus on merchandise product categories.", "Practice note: Implement e-commerce platform monitoring mechanisms to leverage trademark rights for rapidly combating cross-border counterfeiting.", "What to monitor: Unauthorized use of artist names and logos on major online marketplaces and emerging cross-border e-commerce sites."]
core_points_en: Copyright fails to protect band names and merchandise, necessitating trademark law to establish commercial source identification.
Lack of regulation on cross-border e-commerce platforms leads to rampant counterfeit merchandise, severely harming artist brand rights.
Trademark registration serves as the key legal basis for combating counterfeits, requesting takedowns of infringing links, and claiming damages.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Establish a dual protection system covering copyright and trademarks, with specific focus on merchandise product categories.
Practice note: Implement e-commerce platform monitoring mechanisms to leverage trademark rights for rapidly combating cross-border counterfeiting.
What to monitor: Unauthorized use of artist names and logos on major online marketplaces and emerging cross-border e-commerce sites.

items.title: The New EU Designs Implementing Regulation No. 2026/138: Key Changes and Practical Implications for EU Design Filing Practice
items.title_zh: 欧盟新外观设计实施条例：取消七视图限制及文件类型扩展
items.title_en: New EU Designs Implementing Regulation: Key Changes and Practical Implications for Filing Practice
items.summary: The EU Commission has now approved the new EU Designs Implementing Regulation, setting out a number of procedural changes to the EU...
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟委员会批准第 2026/138 号实施条例，将于 2026 年 7 月生效。核心变革包括废除欧盟外观设计申请的“七视图”刚性限制，允许提交更多视角以清晰展示复杂设计；同时扩大可接受文件格式，涵盖视频、动画及计算机建模文件（如 CAD），以适应数字产品及动态图形用户界面的保护需求，显著提升申请灵活性。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Commission has approved Implementing Regulation No. 2026/138, which enters into force on 1 July 2026. This regulation introduces significant procedural modernizations to the EU registered design regime, following substantive legal changes effective May 2025. The most notable updates include the abolition of the rigid seven-view limit for design representations, allowing applicants to submit additional views to clearly depict complex or dynamic features. Furthermore, the scope of acceptable file formats is expanded to include videos, animations, and computer-generated models such as CAD files. These changes align the EU system with technological realities, particularly benefiting the protection of digital products, animated graphical user interfaces, and non-tangible designs. The reforms aim to enhance filing flexibility and improve the clarity of design disclosures before the EUIPO.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国出海企业应利用新规优化数字产品、GUI 及动态界面的欧盟布局，不再受限于静态图。建议提前准备高质量动态素材与三维模型，确保在 2026 年新规生效后能充分利用更灵活的表达方式，提升确权成功率与保护范围。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders should leverage these regulatory updates to optimize their EU design strategies for digital products, GUIs, and dynamic interfaces. The removal of static image constraints enables more precise representation of claimed features. Applicants are advised to prepare high-quality dynamic materials and three-dimensional models in advance. Ensuring readiness for the July 2026 implementation will allow for the full utilization of flexible expression methods, potentially enhancing registration success rates and broadening the scope of protection against infringement.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["废除七视图上限，允许申请人提交更多视图以完整展示复杂或动态设计特征", "接纳视频、动画及 CAD 模型等多元文件格式，适配数字化与非实体产品设计", "新规 aligns 欧盟制度与技术现实，重点优化图形用户界面及 XR/VR 产品保护"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Abolition of the seven-view limit allows applicants to submit more views for complete disclosure of complex or dynamic design features.", "Acceptance of diverse file types including videos, animations, and CAD models adapts to digital and non-entity product design requirements.", "Regulation aligns EU design system with technological realities, optimizing protection for GUIs and XR/VR products."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["数字产品与 GUI 申请人应筹备动态视频或三维模型，替代传统受限的静态视图组合", "利用放宽的视图数量限制，更全面地披露复杂设计细节，规避因表达不清导致的驳回风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Digital product and GUI applicants should prepare dynamic videos or 3D models to replace traditional limited static view combinations.", "Practice note: Utilize relaxed view limits to disclose complex design details comprehensively, mitigating rejection risks due to unclear representation.", "What to monitor: Potential technical limits imposed by the EUIPO online filing system regarding the number of views or file sizes."]
core_points_en: Abolition of the seven-view limit allows applicants to submit more views for complete disclosure of complex or dynamic design features.
Acceptance of diverse file types including videos, animations, and CAD models adapts to digital and non-entity product design requirements.
Regulation aligns EU design system with technological realities, optimizing protection for GUIs and XR/VR products.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Digital product and GUI applicants should prepare dynamic videos or 3D models to replace traditional limited static view combinations.
Practice note: Utilize relaxed view limits to disclose complex design details comprehensively, mitigating rejection risks due to unclear representation.
What to monitor: Potential technical limits imposed by the EUIPO online filing system regarding the number of views or file sizes.

items.title: [Guest post] Wear your trade mark on your sleeve: sponsorship agreements and termination clauses in the football industry
items.title_zh: 袖标上的商标：足球行业赞助协议与终止条款分析
items.title_en: Sleeve Trademarks in Football: Analyzing Sponsorship Termination Clauses and IP Rights
items.summary: The IPKat has received and is pleased to host the following guest contribution by Katfriend Edoardo Cesarini (GR Legal) on a recent Italian first instance decision concerning sponsorship agreements. Here’s what Edoardo writes:Wear your trade mark on your sleeve: sponsorship agreements and termination clauses in the football industryby Edoardo CesariniThe only IPKat-approved sleeveIn a recent
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文基于意大利一审法院近期判决，深入探讨足球行业中赞助协议的法律问题。文章重点分析了赞助商将商标展示于球队袖标的权利性质，以及在协议终止条款触发时，商标使用权的界定与争议解决机制，为体育营销中的知识产权管理提供实务参考。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines a recent Italian first-instance decision regarding sponsorship agreements within the football industry. It focuses on the legal nature of displaying sponsor trademarks on team sleeves and addresses critical issues arising when termination clauses are triggered. The discussion clarifies how trademark usage rights are defined during contract disputes and explores the mechanisms for resolving such conflicts. By dissecting this case, the article provides practical insights into managing intellectual property rights in sports marketing contexts, highlighting the intersection of contractual obligations and trademark protection for stakeholders involved in high-profile sporting partnerships.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧开展体育赞助时，须细化协议终止后的商标撤除义务。建议在合同中明确约定违约情形及过渡期安排，避免因当地司法实践差异引发侵权诉讼或品牌声誉受损风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders engaging in European sports sponsorships should carefully draft post-termination obligations regarding trademark removal. Contracts must explicitly define breach scenarios and establish clear transition periods to mitigate risks. Divergent judicial practices across EU member states can lead to unexpected infringement liabilities or reputational damage if not properly managed. Ensuring precise contractual language helps protect brand integrity and avoids costly litigation following the end of commercial relationships.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["意大利法院审理涉及球衣袖标商标展示的赞助纠纷案件", "明确赞助协议终止后商标使用权限的法律边界与后果", "解析体育行业中商标许可与合同解除条款的交互影响"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Italian courts adjudicate sponsorship disputes involving trademark displays on football jersey sleeves.", "The ruling defines legal boundaries and consequences for trademark usage after agreement termination.", "Analysis covers the interaction between trademark licensing terms and contract rescission clauses."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["细化赞助协议终止后的商标撤除义务与过渡期安排", "关注欧盟成员国司法实践差异以规避潜在侵权风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Define explicit trademark removal duties and transition periods upon sponsorship termination.", "Practice note: Account for divergent national judicial interpretations to prevent inadvertent infringement claims.", "What to monitor: Evolving case law on the interplay between contract rescission and ongoing trademark use."]
core_points_en: Italian courts adjudicate sponsorship disputes involving trademark displays on football jersey sleeves.
The ruling defines legal boundaries and consequences for trademark usage after agreement termination.
Analysis covers the interaction between trademark licensing terms and contract rescission clauses.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Define explicit trademark removal duties and transition periods upon sponsorship termination.
Practice note: Account for divergent national judicial interpretations to prevent inadvertent infringement claims.
What to monitor: Evolving case law on the interplay between contract rescission and ongoing trademark use.

items.title: Competition litigation: 'user damages' for the unlawful collection and use of data?
items.title_zh: 竞争诉讼：非法收集使用数据是否应赔付“用户损害”？
items.title_en: Competition Litigation: Assessing 'User Damages' for Unlawful Data Collection and Use
items.summary: The cause of action in competition cases in the UK is usually the tort of breach of statutory duty. As a general rule, the damages to be awarded for los...
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国竞争案件通常基于违反法定义务侵权，损害赔偿遵循补偿原则。Gormsen 诉 Meta 案提出新视角：若 Meta 未滥用支配地位，本应向用户支付数据对价。该案主张以反事实情境下的应付金额与实际零收益之差，量化集体诉讼中的聚合损害赔偿，挑战传统个案评估模式。
items.ai_summary_en: In UK competition cases, the primary cause of action is typically the tort of breach of statutory duty. Damages generally follow the compensatory principle, aiming to restore the claimant to the position they would have occupied had the tort not occurred. This is often quantified using a counterfactual analysis comparing actual outcomes with hypothetical lawful scenarios. The ongoing Gormsen v Meta case before the Competition Appeal Tribunal presents a novel application of this framework in collective proceedings. The class representative alleges that Meta abused its dominant position by conditioning Facebook access on the surrender of off-Facebook personal data, constituting an unfair trading condition or price. The claim quantifies loss as the difference between the zero payments actually received and the hypothetical remuneration users should have received for their data under a lawful counterfactual. This approach challenges traditional individual loss assessments by relying on aggregate damages, a method previously endorsed by the UK Supreme Court to facilitate efficient resolution in collective actions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中企需警惕数据合规引发的竞争诉讼风险，尤其是平台型企业。建议重新评估数据获取条款的公平性，预设潜在的数据对价赔偿模型，并关注英国集体诉讼中聚合损害赔偿的最新司法动向。
items.ai_insight_en: Platform operators and digital service providers face increasing litigation risks where data collection practices are challenged as abusive dominance. Legal teams should proactively review data access terms to ensure they withstand scrutiny as fair trading conditions rather than exploitative prices. Establishing robust internal models for valuing user data contributions can help anticipate potential compensation liabilities. Furthermore, stakeholders must closely monitor judicial developments regarding aggregate damages in UK collective proceedings, as these mechanisms significantly lower the barriers for large-scale claims. Understanding how courts quantify non-monetary losses, such as privacy or data rights, will be critical for risk management and strategic defense planning in future competition disputes involving digital markets.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国竞争侵权赔偿通常遵循填补损失的补偿性原则", "Gormsen 诉 Meta 案主张将未获数据对价视为可量化损失", "集体诉讼允许采用聚合方式评估损害而非逐一个人核算"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UK competition torts generally apply compensatory principles to quantify loss via counterfactual comparisons of actual versus lawful market conditions.", "Gormsen v Meta claims quantify user loss as the difference between zero actual payments and hypothetical remuneration for off-Facebook data.", "Collective proceedings allow aggregate damage assessments, bypassing the need for individual loss verification as supported by Supreme Court precedent."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["平台企业应审查数据授权条款以防被诉滥用支配地位", "需提前构建数据价值评估模型以应对潜在聚合赔偿诉求"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Platform enterprises should audit data authorization clauses to mitigate risks of abuse of dominance allegations.", "Practice note: Develop internal data valuation frameworks to prepare for potential aggregate compensation claims in collective actions.", "What to monitor: Judicial trends in the UK regarding the assessment of aggregate damages and the quantification of data-related losses."]
core_points_en: UK competition torts generally apply compensatory principles to quantify loss via counterfactual comparisons of actual versus lawful market conditions.
Gormsen v Meta claims quantify user loss as the difference between zero actual payments and hypothetical remuneration for off-Facebook data.
Collective proceedings allow aggregate damage assessments, bypassing the need for individual loss verification as supported by Supreme Court precedent.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Platform enterprises should audit data authorization clauses to mitigate risks of abuse of dominance allegations.
Practice note: Develop internal data valuation frameworks to prepare for potential aggregate compensation claims in collective actions.
What to monitor: Judicial trends in the UK regarding the assessment of aggregate damages and the quantification of data-related losses.

items.title: Marks & Clerk launches AI practice group with double partner appointment
items.title_zh: Marks & Clerk 成立 AI 实务组并双聘合伙人
items.title_en: Marks & Clerk Launches AI Practice Group with Double Partner Appointment to Address Emerging Tech Legal Needs
items.summary: AI, cybersecurity and data practice group will provide clients with legal guidance around AI alongside a 'deep technical foundation’ in IP
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知名知识产权律所 Marks & Clerk 宣布成立专注于人工智能、网络安全与数据的新型实务团队。该举措通过双合伙人任命强化领导层，旨在结合深厚的知识产权技术基础，为客户提供关于 AI 技术应用、数据合规及网络安全的综合法律指导，回应欧洲市场对新兴技术法律服务的迫切需求。
items.ai_summary_en: Leading UK intellectual property law firm Marks & Clerk has announced the establishment of a new specialized practice group focused on artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, and data protection. This strategic initiative features the appointment of two partners to strengthen leadership within the team. The group aims to provide comprehensive legal guidance regarding AI technology applications, data compliance, and cybersecurity measures. By leveraging a deep technical foundation in intellectual property rights, the firm seeks to address the urgent market demand for sophisticated legal services related to emerging technologies across Europe. This move reflects the growing intersection of IP law with digital innovation and regulatory compliance requirements.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局 AI 产品时，需关注此类专业团队带来的合规审查趋严态势。建议提前评估算法透明度与数据源合法性，利用专业外部 counsel 规避侵权风险，适应欧洲高标准的知识产权与数据保护监管环境。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants deploying AI products in Europe should anticipate stricter compliance reviews driven by such specialized legal teams. It is advisable to proactively assess algorithm transparency and the legality of data sources to mitigate infringement risks. Engaging external counsel early can help navigate the high standards of European intellectual property and data protection regulations. This approach ensures alignment with evolving regulatory expectations and supports robust operational frameworks for AI-driven innovations within the EU jurisdiction.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["律所成立专门团队聚焦 AI 与数据合规领域", "双合伙人架构强化技术背景与法律服务深度", "整合 IP 基础以应对人工智能衍生法律挑战"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The firm established a dedicated team focusing specifically on artificial intelligence integration and complex data compliance challenges.", "A dual partner structure enhances both technical expertise and the depth of legal service delivery for clients.", "The group integrates foundational intellectual property knowledge to effectively address legal challenges derived from artificial intelligence."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注欧方 AI 合规新动向以预防潜在侵权纠纷", "借助专业法律服务优化在欧数据与算法布局"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor new AI compliance trends to prevent potential infringement disputes and ensure regulatory alignment.", "Practice note: Leverage specialized legal services to optimize data management and algorithm deployment strategies in Europe.", "What to monitor: Evolving interpretations of AI-related IP rights and data protection obligations under EU law."]
core_points_en: The firm established a dedicated team focusing specifically on artificial intelligence integration and complex data compliance challenges.
A dual partner structure enhances both technical expertise and the depth of legal service delivery for clients.
The group integrates foundational intellectual property knowledge to effectively address legal challenges derived from artificial intelligence.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor new AI compliance trends to prevent potential infringement disputes and ensure regulatory alignment.
Practice note: Leverage specialized legal services to optimize data management and algorithm deployment strategies in Europe.
What to monitor: Evolving interpretations of AI-related IP rights and data protection obligations under EU law.

items.title: “Only a truly European UPC is attractive in the long term”
items.title_zh: 唯有真正的欧洲 UPC 才具长期吸引力
items.title_en: Concerns Mount Over German Dominance in UPC and Its Long-Term European Credibility
items.summary: It was only a matter of time before the dominance of German judges and divisions at the UPC became a problem. Even before the court opened its doors, market participants from other countries expressed concerns that this would result in a German court with Europe-wide jurisdiction rather than the originally planned European system. The latest […] The post “Only a truly European UPC is attractive in the long term” appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 文章指出统一专利法院（UPC）中德国法官及分部的主导地位已成隐患。早在法院成立前，多国市场参与者便担忧其演变为拥有泛欧管辖权的“德国法院”，背离初衷。这种结构性失衡若持续，将削弱 UPC 作为真正欧洲司法体系的长期吸引力与公信力。
items.ai_summary_en: The article highlights growing concerns regarding the disproportionate influence of German judges and divisions within the Unified Patent Court (UPC). Even prior to the court's operational launch, market participants from various jurisdictions expressed apprehension that the UPC might evolve into a de facto German court exercising Europe-wide jurisdiction, rather than functioning as the intended pan-European judicial system. This structural imbalance threatens to undermine the institution's legitimacy and attractiveness. If the dominance persists, it risks alienating non-German stakeholders and compromising the perception of impartiality essential for a unified patent litigation framework. The commentary underscores that maintaining genuine European diversity in judicial appointments and divisional operations is critical to preserving the UPC's long-term credibility and ensuring it remains a trusted venue for cross-border patent disputes across the continent.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧诉讼需警惕潜在的地域偏见风险，避免过度依赖单一分部。建议优化管辖地选择策略，利用轮值机制平衡诉讼阵地，并密切关注 UPC 人员结构改革动向以规避不利裁判。
items.ai_insight_en: Litigants appearing before the Unified Patent Court should remain aware of potential perceptions regarding regional bias stemming from the current demographic composition of the judiciary. Relying exclusively on specific divisions, particularly those perceived as having strong national ties, may introduce strategic vulnerabilities. Parties are advised to adopt a diversified forum selection strategy, leveraging the court's rotational mechanisms and multi-jurisdictional panels to mitigate any perceived or actual imbalances. Continuous monitoring of administrative reforms and judicial appointment trends within the UPC is recommended to anticipate shifts in procedural dynamics and ensure robust defense or enforcement strategies across different European venues.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德国法官在 UPC 中占据主导地位引发广泛担忧", "外界质疑 UPC 正异化为泛欧管辖的德国法院", "唯有保持欧洲多元性方能确保 UPC 长期吸引力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Dominance of German judges and divisions at the UPC has raised significant concerns among international market participants regarding institutional balance.", "Critics fear the court may function as a German entity with pan-European reach, deviating from its original design as a truly European judicial body.", "Sustaining European diversity in composition and procedure is deemed essential to ensure the UPC's long-term attractiveness and legal credibility."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕德国主导可能带来的裁判倾向性风险", "灵活选择管辖分部以平衡诉讼策略与成本"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Be mindful of potential regional biases arising from the current dominance of German judges in UPC proceedings.", "Practice note: Diversify forum selection strategies by utilizing rotational mechanisms and avoiding over-reliance on single divisions.", "What to monitor: Track ongoing reforms in UPC personnel structure and divisional assignments to adjust litigation tactics proactively."]
core_points_en: Dominance of German judges and divisions at the UPC has raised significant concerns among international market participants regarding institutional balance.
Critics fear the court may function as a German entity with pan-European reach, deviating from its original design as a truly European judicial body.
Sustaining European diversity in composition and procedure is deemed essential to ensure the UPC's long-term attractiveness and legal credibility.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Be mindful of potential regional biases arising from the current dominance of German judges in UPC proceedings.
Practice note: Diversify forum selection strategies by utilizing rotational mechanisms and avoiding over-reliance on single divisions.
What to monitor: Track ongoing reforms in UPC personnel structure and divisional assignments to adjust litigation tactics proactively.

items.title: Freshly squeezed: how Appleyard Lees secured mandarin PVR win
items.title_zh: Appleyard Lees 如何赢得柑橘植物育种权胜诉
items.title_en: Appleyard Lees Secures Victory in EU Plant Breeder Rights Dispute Over Tango Mandarin
items.summary: Lawyers at Appleyard Lees share how they picked apart a plant breeder’s infringement claims concerning the ‘Tango’ mandarin
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国 Appleyard Lees 律所分享其在'Tango'柑橘品种侵权案中的胜诉经验。该案涉及植物育种者权利（PVR）纠纷，律师团队通过细致拆解育种者的侵权主张，成功为客户辩护。文章重点剖析了证据分析与法律抗辩策略，展示了在欧盟框架下应对植物品种保护诉讼的关键实务技巧。
items.ai_summary_en: Lawyers at Appleyard Lees detail their successful defense strategy in a plant breeder rights infringement case concerning the 'Tango' mandarin variety. The firm effectively dismantled the plaintiff's infringement claims through rigorous evidence analysis and precise legal arguments. This case highlights critical practical techniques for navigating plant variety protection litigation within the European Union framework. By focusing on the specific scope of protection and challenging the evidentiary basis of the accuser, the legal team secured a favorable outcome for their client, demonstrating the importance of detailed factual scrutiny in complex intellectual property disputes involving agricultural products.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国农企出口欧盟需警惕植物新品种侵权风险。建议提前开展自由实施分析，建立品种权属档案，并借鉴本案证据拆解策略，以应对潜在的海外知识产权诉讼挑战。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants exporting agricultural products to the European Union must remain vigilant regarding potential plant variety infringement risks. Conducting thorough freedom-to-operate due diligence before market entry is essential to identify conflicting rights. Establishing comprehensive archives of variety ownership and genetic data provides a strong foundation for defense. Furthermore, adopting the evidence disassembly strategies demonstrated in this case can help build robust infringement defense systems. These measures enable companies to better manage overseas intellectual property challenges and mitigate litigation exposure in competitive global markets.

items.title: UPC update: When trade secrets become open | Abbott files claim
items.title_zh: UPC 更新：雅培提起诉讼引发商业秘密公开风险
items.title_en: UPC Update: Abbott Filing Risks Trade Secret Disclosure Amid Jurisdictional Shifts
items.summary: A further decision on long-arm status, and a new hire for Pentarc in Germany from Taylor Wessing were also among top developments
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文报道统一专利法院（UPC）最新诉讼动态，重点指出雅培（Abbott）已正式提起诉讼，该程序可能导致原本受保护的商业秘密在诉讼过程中被迫公开。此外，文章还涵盖了关于“长臂管辖”地位的最新裁决，以及德国专利诉讼领域的人才流动情况，反映了 UPC 体系下诉讼策略与保密机制的新挑战。
items.ai_summary_en: This report examines recent developments at the Unified Patent Court (UPC), highlighting Abbott’s newly filed claim which raises significant concerns regarding the potential forced disclosure of protected trade secrets during litigation proceedings. The article further details a pivotal judicial decision concerning long-arm jurisdiction status, clarifying the court's reach in cross-border disputes. Additionally, it notes notable personnel movements within the German patent litigation sector, specifically a new hire at Pentarc from Taylor Wessing. These updates collectively underscore the evolving complexities of UPC litigation strategies and the critical challenges parties face in maintaining confidentiality while navigating the expanding procedural framework of the European patent system.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧利用 UPC 维权时，需高度评估商业秘密泄露风险，提前制定保密令申请策略。同时应关注管辖权扩张趋势，合理布局德国及泛欧诉讼阵地，防范因程序公开导致的核心技术外溢。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders engaging with the UPC must rigorously assess the risk of trade secret exposure inherent in open court proceedings. It is essential to proactively develop robust strategies for securing protective orders and confidential information rings early in the litigation lifecycle. Furthermore, stakeholders should closely monitor trends in jurisdictional expansion, particularly regarding long-arm rulings, to optimize their litigation positioning across Germany and broader Europe. Effective management of these procedural elements is crucial to preventing core technological knowledge from leaking due to mandatory transparency requirements in patent enforcement actions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["雅培向 UPC 提起诉讼，触发商业秘密潜在公开风险", "UPC 作出关于长臂管辖地位的最新司法裁决", "德国专利诉讼市场出现重要律所人才流动动态"]

items.title: Abbott, Sinocare and Menarini meet for second time at Court of Appeal
items.title_zh: 雅培、三诺与美纳里尼二审再聚统一专利法院
items.title_en: Abbott, Sinocare, and Menarini Clash Again at UPC Court of Appeal in Glucose Monitor Dispute
items.summary: Abbott is regarded as the market leader for mobile phone-based glucose-monitoring systems. When the UPC first launched, the US company filed a lawsuit against Dexcom’s competing products. This was followed by further campaigns against smaller competitors such as SiBionics and Sinocare. While Abbott’s dispute with Dexcom has long since been settled, the market leader recently […] The post Abbott, Sinocare and Menarini meet for second time at Court of Appeal appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 作为移动血糖监测系统市场领导者，美国雅培公司在统一专利法院（UPC）成立初期起诉德康医疗，随后将诉讼扩展至三诺生物等较小竞争对手。尽管与德康的纠纷已和解，但雅培与三诺及美纳里尼的专利争端持续升级，双方近日再次齐聚 UPC 上诉法院进行第二次交锋，显示该领域专利战长期化趋势。
items.ai_summary_en: Abbott, recognized as the market leader for mobile phone-based glucose-monitoring systems, initiated litigation shortly after the Unified Patent Court (UPC) launched. The US company first targeted Dexcom’s competing products before expanding its enforcement campaigns against smaller competitors, including Sinocare and Menarini. Although the dispute with Dexcom was settled long ago, the patent conflict involving Abbott, Sinocare, and Menarini has intensified. The parties recently met for a second time at the UPC Court of Appeal. This development highlights the increasingly prolonged nature of patent warfare within the European medical device sector, as major rights holders leverage the new centralised forum to challenge multiple market participants simultaneously across jurisdictions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国医疗器械企业出海面临严峻专利壁垒，需警惕行业巨头利用 UPC 进行泛欧围剿。建议提前开展 FTO 分析，储备无效证据，并熟悉 UPC 上诉程序以应对高频诉讼风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants in the medical device sector should anticipate aggressive enforcement strategies by industry leaders utilizing the Unified Patent Court’s centralized jurisdiction. The current litigation trend suggests that rights holders are willing to pursue multi-defendant campaigns to secure pan-European market positions. Companies operating in this space must prioritize robust freedom-to-operate analyses prior to product launches. Furthermore, preparing comprehensive invalidity evidence and understanding the specific procedural nuances of UPC appeals are critical for effective defense. Proactive strategic planning is essential to mitigate the risks associated with high-frequency cross-border patent litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["雅培在 UPC 发起多起针对血糖监测竞品的专利诉讼", "三诺生物与美纳里尼成为雅培后续重点打击的竞争对手", "相关案件已进入统一专利法院上诉阶段，争议持续发酵"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Abbott initiated multiple patent lawsuits at the UPC targeting various competitors in the glucose monitoring technology sector.", "Sinocare and Menarini have emerged as key targets in Abbott's subsequent enforcement campaigns against smaller rivals.", "The ongoing disputes have advanced to the appeal stage at the Unified Patent Court, indicating sustained legal contention."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕跨国巨头利用 UPC 机制发起泛欧专利围剿", "深化 UPC 上诉策略研究，强化海外纠纷应对能力"]

Sinocare and Menarini have emerged as key targets in Abbott's subsequent enforcement campaigns against smaller rivals.
The ongoing disputes have advanced to the appeal stage at the Unified Patent Court, indicating sustained legal contention.

Practice note: Develop robust appellate strategies and secure early invalidity evidence to counter potential multi-jurisdictional infringement claims.
What to monitor: Track Abbott's evolving litigation tactics and the UPC Court of Appeal's handling of complex medical device patent disputes.

items.title: For a Real European Patent Law — A Contribution to the Debate on the Redistribution of UPC Cases
items.title_zh: 构建真正的欧洲专利法：论统一专利法院案件重新分配
items.title_en: Beyond Caseload Management: Reimagining UPC Case Distribution for a Genuine European Patent Law
items.summary: “Europe will not be made all at once, or according to a single plan. It will be built through concrete achievements.” — Schuman Declaration, 9 May 1950
items.ai_summary_zh: 文章批判将统一专利法院（UPC）案件集中视为单纯“案件管理”或“当事人自治”的观点。指出诉讼向少数本地分院集中并非自由选择的自然结果，而是既有司法资本与程序架构导向的产物。强调需重构案件分配机制，以创造真正多元化的欧洲专利法发展环境，避免制度性收敛。
items.ai_summary_en: This commentary challenges the prevailing view that case concentration within the Unified Patent Court (UPC) is merely a matter of administrative efficiency or party autonomy. It argues that litigation trends toward specific local divisions are not spontaneous outcomes of free choice, but rather the result of existing judicial capital and procedural architectures that systematically channel litigants. The text asserts that relying on party autonomy obscures how the court's structure narrows procedural pathways. To foster a truly pluralistic European patent law, the current distribution mechanisms must be reformed. Without such structural adjustments, the system risks institutional convergence, limiting the diversity of legal interpretation and undermining the foundational goal of creating a distinct, unified European patent jurisprudence.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧诉讼策略需警惕“路径依赖”，避免盲目跟随主流分院。应关注 UPC 案件分配改革动向，评估新兴分院机会，利用多元化司法环境优化维权或应诉布局，降低单一司法辖区不确定性风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should avoid path dependency in forum selection, recognizing that defaulting to popular divisions may reinforce systemic biases rather than reflect optimal strategic positioning. Rights holders and defendants must critically assess whether perceived advantages in established venues outweigh the risks of homogeneous jurisprudence. As the debate on case redistribution evolves, stakeholders should remain agile, evaluating opportunities in emerging divisions to diversify their dispute resolution portfolios. This approach helps mitigate uncertainties associated with reliance on a single judicial hub and aligns with broader efforts to shape a balanced, multi-faceted European patent landscape.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["案件集中非自由选择结果，实为既有司法惯性与架构导向所致", "单纯援引当事人自治无法掩盖诉讼路径被系统性窄化的事实", "亟需通过案件重新分配，培育真正具有多元性的欧洲专利法治"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Case concentration reflects systemic architectural biases and established judicial habits rather than neutral, free market choices by litigants.", "Invoking party autonomy fails to address how procedural frameworks systematically narrow available litigation paths and limit genuine choice.", "Reforming case distribution is essential to cultivate a diverse legal environment and prevent institutional convergence in European patent adjudication."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕诉讼路径依赖，避免因从众心理陷入不利司法辖区", "密切关注案件分配改革，灵活调整在欧专利争议解决策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid blind adherence to mainstream divisions; assess if 'path dependence' creates unnecessary exposure to concentrated judicial risks.", "Practice note: Evaluate emerging local divisions as viable alternatives to diversify litigation strategy and reduce dependency on dominant venues.", "What to monitor: Track developments in UPC case redistribution reforms and shifts in procedural expectations across different divisions."]
core_points_en: Case concentration reflects systemic architectural biases and established judicial habits rather than neutral, free market choices by litigants.
Invoking party autonomy fails to address how procedural frameworks systematically narrow available litigation paths and limit genuine choice.
Reforming case distribution is essential to cultivate a diverse legal environment and prevent institutional convergence in European patent adjudication.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid blind adherence to mainstream divisions; assess if 'path dependence' creates unnecessary exposure to concentrated judicial risks.
Practice note: Evaluate emerging local divisions as viable alternatives to diversify litigation strategy and reduce dependency on dominant venues.
What to monitor: Track developments in UPC case redistribution reforms and shifts in procedural expectations across different divisions.

items.title: Unhinged? The technical challenges of registering a motion mark
items.title_zh: 失控？欧盟动态商标注册的技术挑战与功能例外
items.title_en: Unhinged? The technical challenges of registering a motion mark
items.summary: Discover how to register a motion mark in the EU, including how to avoid the risk of trademark refusal due to a technical functionality.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 1 月，欧盟普通法院驳回了一项铰链窗动态商标申请，认定其运动仅由技术功能过程组成。文章解析该案，指出若标志基本特征均实现技术结果，依据《欧盟商标条例》第 7(1)(e)(ii) 条将被驳回。评估客观且不考虑替代方案，旨在防止通过商标垄断技术方案或延长专利保护期。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请动态商标时，须严格区分品牌识别特征与产品技术功能。若运动轨迹仅为实现机械效果，极可能被拒。建议提前进行功能性排查，避免将技术方案误作商标布局，导致资源浪费及保护落空。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["动态商标若仅包含技术功能过程，将无法获得注册保护", "技术功能性评估是客观的，不依赖消费者感知或替代方案存在", "商标法严禁被用于垄断技术方案或变相延长专利权期限"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["申请前需剥离纯技术动作，确保动态元素具备显著识别性", "警惕利用商标变相延长专利保护期的法律风险与合规红线"]

items.title_zh: 布达佩斯高等法院就商标案向欧盟法院提请初步裁决
items.title_en: Never Too Late: If you missed the IPKat last week!
items.summary: Kat on the way homeAs the INTA Annual Meeting wraps up, the IPKat knows you’ve probably been far too busy to keep up with everything happening on your beloved blog. If that’s the case, don’t worry – last week’s round-up is ready for you:Trade MarksMarcel Pemsel reported on the recent reference for a preliminary ruling from the Budapest High Court to the CJEU (Dr. Czirják-Nagy Ügyvédi Iroda,
items.ai_summary_zh: IPKat周报摘要显示，布达佩斯高等法院近期就一起商标案件向欧盟法院（CJEU）提起了初步裁决请求。该动态由Marcel Pemsel报道，涉及Dr. Czirják-Nagy律师事务所相关案件。原文仅为简报片段，未提供案件具体争议焦点或法律细节。

items.title: 10 common pitfalls that can derail IP agreements
items.title_zh: 阻碍知识产权协议达成的十大常见陷阱
items.title_en: Ten Common Pitfalls That Can Derail Intellectual Property Agreements
items.summary: The stakes are high but many deals fail because of vague language, overlooked clauses or misunderstood obligations
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文指出尽管知识产权交易至关重要，但常因语言模糊、条款遗漏或义务误解而失败。文章梳理了十种常见陷阱，旨在帮助从业者识别并规避合同起草与谈判中的关键风险，确保交易安全与合规，提升协议执行效率。
items.ai_summary_en: Intellectual property transactions are critical for business growth, yet many deals fail due to vague language, overlooked clauses, or misunderstood obligations. This analysis identifies ten common pitfalls that frequently derail IP agreements, aiming to help practitioners recognize and avoid key risks during contract drafting and negotiation. By addressing these issues, parties can ensure transaction security and compliance while improving agreement execution efficiency. The article emphasizes that high stakes often lead to significant losses when foundational contractual elements are neglected. It serves as a practical guide for legal teams and business leaders to systematically review agreement details, thereby preventing costly disputes and ensuring that the intended commercial objectives are legally secured and effectively implemented across jurisdictions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧进行 IP 许可或转让时，需警惕文化差异导致的条款理解偏差。建议聘请当地专业律师严格审查协议措辞，明确界定各方义务，避免因模糊条款引发高昂的跨境诉讼成本。
items.ai_insight_en: For companies engaging in cross-border IP licensing or transfer activities within Europe, cultural differences may lead to deviations in clause interpretation. It is essential to eliminate ambiguous terminology in contracts and precisely define rights boundaries and obligations. Engaging local professional counsel to strictly review agreement wording helps clarify mutual duties, avoiding expensive cross-border litigation costs triggered by vague terms. Establishing a rigorous agreement review mechanism prevents oversight of critical protection clauses. This approach ensures that international IP strategies are supported by robust legal frameworks, minimizing exposure to enforcement risks and enhancing the overall reliability of commercial partnerships in diverse regulatory environments.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["模糊的语言表述是导致 IP 协议纠纷与失效的首要原因", "忽视关键条款或未明确界定义务将直接增加交易违约风险", "系统性地审查协议细节是避免交易脱轨的必要预防措施"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Vague language is the primary cause of disputes and invalidation in intellectual property agreements.", "Ignoring key clauses or failing to clearly define obligations directly increases the risk of transaction default.", "Systematic review of agreement details is a necessary preventive measure to avoid deal derailment."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["务必消除合同中的模糊用语，精确界定权利边界与义务", "建立严格的协议审查机制，防止因疏忽遗漏关键保护条款"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Eliminate ambiguous contract terms and precisely define rights boundaries and obligations.", "Practice note: Establish strict agreement review mechanisms to prevent omission of key protection clauses.", "What to monitor: Cultural differences in clause interpretation and potential ambiguities in cross-border IP deals."]
core_points_en: Vague language is the primary cause of disputes and invalidation in intellectual property agreements.
Ignoring key clauses or failing to clearly define obligations directly increases the risk of transaction default.
Systematic review of agreement details is a necessary preventive measure to avoid deal derailment.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Eliminate ambiguous contract terms and precisely define rights boundaries and obligations.
Practice note: Establish strict agreement review mechanisms to prevent omission of key protection clauses.
What to monitor: Cultural differences in clause interpretation and potential ambiguities in cross-border IP deals.

items.title: Europe debates the redistribution of UPC cases
items.title_zh: 欧洲热议统一专利法院案件重新分配方案
items.title_en: Europe debates the redistribution of UPC cases
items.summary: In an open letter published today, Bardehle Pagenberg comments on EPLAW’s proposals for possible measures to achieve a more balanced distribution of cases across all divisions of the UPC. The background to the statement is a discussion among UPC member states on the topic at the February meeting of the Administrative Committee. Following this, the Advisory […] The post Europe debates the redistribution of UPC cases appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 针对统一专利法院各分庭案件分布不均问题，EPLAW 提出平衡措施建议。巴德赫勒·帕根伯格律所发表公开信评论该提案，背景源于成员国在行政委员会二月会议上的讨论。目前咨询委员会正跟进此事，旨在优化案件分流机制，确保司法资源均衡配置，避免特定分庭过载。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业需关注案件分配规则变化，避免因管辖集中导致诉讼成本激增或策略失效。建议提前布局多法域应对方案，密切跟踪行政委员会最终决议，调整在欧洲的专利维权与防御策略。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPLAW 提议采取措施平衡统一专利法院各分庭案件量", "律所公开信回应成员国在行政委员会上的初步讨论", "咨询委员会正介入评估，以推动更公平的案件分配机制"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注案件分流机制变动，预防单一分庭诉讼拥堵风险", "动态调整欧洲专利诉讼策略，适应新的管辖分配格局"]

items.title: IP law firm contempt of court battle heats up
items.title_zh: 知识产权律所藐视法庭之争升级
items.title_en: Stobbs Seeks Dismissal of Contempt Proceedings Against Firm and Two Lawyers
items.summary: Stobbs has applied to strike out a contempt of court application filed against the firm and two of its lawyers
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权律所 Stobbs 及其两名律师面临藐视法庭指控，该所已正式申请驳回相关动议。此案凸显了在欧洲（特别是英国）知识产权诉讼中，代理机构与律师个人可能因程序违规而面临的严厉司法制裁风险，标志着双方围绕执业纪律的法律博弈进入关键阶段。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK intellectual property law firm Stobbs has formally applied to strike out a contempt of court application filed against the firm itself and two of its individual lawyers. This legal development underscores the severe judicial sanctions that agencies and practitioners may face in European, particularly British, IP litigation due to procedural non-compliance. The case highlights the critical intersection between professional conduct obligations and judicial authority, marking a pivotal phase in the legal contest regarding disciplinary standards. It serves as a stark reminder that courts maintain strict oversight over litigation behavior, ensuring that procedural rules are adhered to rigorously by all parties involved in complex intellectual property disputes.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国企业需警惕合作方或自身代理人的程序合规风险，避免因藐视法庭导致案件被动。建议强化对欧洲诉讼代理行为的尽职调查，确保严格遵守当地法院程序规则，防范连带法律责任。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants engaging in UK intellectual property litigation must prioritize rigorous adherence to local court procedural rules to avoid severe consequences such as contempt findings. Rights holders should conduct thorough due diligence on the procedural compliance records of their legal representatives to mitigate associated risks. Establishing internal cross-border litigation monitoring mechanisms is essential to prevent inadvertent breaches of court discipline. Proactive management of these compliance aspects ensures that strategic objectives are not compromised by procedural missteps or allegations of misconduct during active proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Stobbs 律所申请驳回针对其及律师的藐视法庭指控", "案件聚焦于诉讼程序中的执业行为合规性与司法权威", "反映了英国法院对知识产权代理方程序违规的零容忍态度"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Stobbs has applied to dismiss contempt charges brought against the firm and two specific lawyers.", "The dispute centers on compliance with litigation procedures and the preservation of judicial authority.", "The case reflects the UK courts' zero-tolerance stance toward procedural violations by IP representatives."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["严格审查欧洲代理律师的程序合规记录以规避连带风险", "建立跨境诉讼内部预警机制以防触犯当地法庭纪律"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Scrutinize the procedural compliance history of European legal counsel to avoid joint liability risks.", "Practice note: Implement internal early warning systems for cross-border litigation to prevent violations of local court discipline.", "What to monitor: Developments in this contempt application and broader trends in judicial enforcement of procedural rules."]
core_points_en: Stobbs has applied to dismiss contempt charges brought against the firm and two specific lawyers.
The dispute centers on compliance with litigation procedures and the preservation of judicial authority.
The case reflects the UK courts' zero-tolerance stance toward procedural violations by IP representatives.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Scrutinize the procedural compliance history of European legal counsel to avoid joint liability risks.
Practice note: Implement internal early warning systems for cross-border litigation to prevent violations of local court discipline.
What to monitor: Developments in this contempt application and broader trends in judicial enforcement of procedural rules.

items.title: The ‘machine unlearning’ problem: AI’s hidden licensing and compliance challenges
items.title_zh: 机器遗忘难题：AI 隐藏的许可与合规挑战
items.title_en: The ‘machine unlearning’ problem: AI’s hidden licensing and compliance challenges
items.summary: The machine unlearning problem introduces a new category of liability. In AI licensing, the key question is whether verification infrastructure can keep pace with what the machine has already learned. The answer will increasingly depend on whether companies treat data licence governance as an operational priority.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文指出“机器遗忘”成为 AI 治理新痛点。当训练数据许可变更或撤销时，已内化数据的模型难以剥离相关权利痕迹。随着 AI 系统演变为复杂的许可堆栈，企业若忽视数据许可治理基础设施，将面临巨大的合规断层与法律责任风险。
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中企应重新审视 AI 训练数据许可协议，建立动态合规监控机制。建议提前部署可追溯的数据治理架构，以应对未来可能的数据撤回或法规变更，避免因“机器遗忘”技术瓶颈陷入侵权纠纷。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["机器遗忘难题引发新型责任，验证设施需跟上模型学习速度", "AI 系统正演变为多层级许可生态，数据权利治理复杂度剧增", "传统删除资产模式失效，模型参数内化知识导致合规验证困难"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["将数据许可治理提升为运营优先项，弥补技术与法务断层", "构建可验证的权利追踪体系，防范模型内化数据带来的隐性风险"]

items.title: EU zeroes in on China’s e-commerce giants as AliExpress faces grilling
items.title_zh: 欧盟聚焦中国电商巨头，速卖通面临严厉质询
items.title_en: EU Legislators Intensify Scrutiny of AliExpress Over Counterfeit Goods and Illegal Listings
items.summary: Alibaba executives told lawmakers the company was working to address outstanding issues over illegal listings and counterfeits, a week after a major new online platform entered the European market.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟立法者就非法列表和假冒商品问题对阿里巴巴高管进行质询。此次会议发生在一个大型新电商平台进入欧洲市场一周后，凸显欧盟加强对中国电商巨头监管的决心。阿里方面承诺正积极解决现存违规问题，表明欧洲在数字单一市场背景下，正收紧对跨境平台知识产权侵权的执法力度。
items.ai_summary_en: European Union lawmakers recently questioned senior executives from Alibaba regarding persistent issues concerning illegal product listings and counterfeit goods on its platforms. This high-profile hearing occurred shortly after a major new e-commerce platform entered the European market, signaling a broader regulatory shift. The session underscores the EU's determined effort to strengthen oversight of Chinese e-commerce giants operating within its borders. During the proceedings, Alibaba representatives committed to actively resolving outstanding compliance violations. This development highlights the tightening enforcement landscape for cross-border digital platforms under the Digital Single Market framework. Rights holders and market participants should note that European authorities are increasingly prioritizing intellectual property protection, demanding greater accountability and proactive measures from large online marketplaces to combat infringement effectively.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国电商企业需立即升级知识产权合规体系，建立主动监测机制。面对欧盟日益严格的执法环境，被动应对将导致更高法律风险与市场准入障碍，建议提前布局本地化合规团队。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in Europe must urgently upgrade their intellectual property compliance frameworks to meet evolving regulatory expectations. Relying on reactive measures is no longer sufficient given the intensified enforcement environment, which poses significant legal risks and potential barriers to market access. Companies should establish robust, proactive monitoring systems capable of detecting and removing infringing content rapidly. Furthermore, strengthening local compliance teams within the EU is essential to effectively manage regulatory inquiries and demonstrate good faith efforts to authorities. Proactive adaptation to these stricter standards will help mitigate liability and ensure sustainable operations in the competitive European digital economy.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟立法者就假货问题质询阿里巴巴高管", "速卖通等中国电商平台面临更严合规审查", "阿里承诺解决非法列表与假冒商品遗留问题"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EU legislators formally questioned Alibaba executives regarding ongoing challenges with illegal listings and counterfeit products.", "Chinese e-commerce platforms face heightened compliance scrutiny as regulators tighten controls on cross-border marketplace operations.", "Alibaba committed to addressing existing violations, reflecting stricter IP enforcement trends within the European Digital Single Market."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["建立主动侵权监测与快速下架响应机制", "强化欧盟本地化合规团队以应对监管质询"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Urgent need to upgrade IP compliance systems to avoid legal risks and market access barriers in the EU.", "Practice note: Establish proactive infringement monitoring mechanisms and rapid takedown response protocols for immediate implementation.", "What to monitor: Strengthen local EU compliance teams to effectively handle regulatory inquiries and demonstrate operational diligence."]
core_points_en: EU legislators formally questioned Alibaba executives regarding ongoing challenges with illegal listings and counterfeit products.
Chinese e-commerce platforms face heightened compliance scrutiny as regulators tighten controls on cross-border marketplace operations.
Alibaba committed to addressing existing violations, reflecting stricter IP enforcement trends within the European Digital Single Market.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Urgent need to upgrade IP compliance systems to avoid legal risks and market access barriers in the EU.
Practice note: Establish proactive infringement monitoring mechanisms and rapid takedown response protocols for immediate implementation.
What to monitor: Strengthen local EU compliance teams to effectively handle regulatory inquiries and demonstrate operational diligence.

items.title: Questel Appoints Frederic Beylier As New CEO
items.title_zh: Questel任命Frederic Beylier为新任首席执行官
items.title_en: Questel Appoints Frederic Beylier as New CEO to Drive AI and SaaS Transformation
items.summary: Seasoned Technology Entrepreneur Beylier Brings Extensive Experience in Leading Global Organizations Through Rapid Growth and Technology Transformation
items.ai_summary_zh: 全球知识产权解决方案提供商Questel宣布任命Frederic Beylier为新任首席执行官，接替任职25年的Charles Besson。Beylier常驻巴黎总部，此前曾担任Flowbird集团CEO及IDEMIA首席运营官。他将致力于加强Questel的集成IP生态系统，整合AI驱动工作流与专家服务，以巩固其在全球IP技术市场的领导地位。
items.ai_summary_en: Questel, a leading global provider of intellectual property solutions, has appointed seasoned technology executive Frederic Beylier as its new Chief Executive Officer. Beylier succeeds Charles Besson, who led the company for twenty-five years and will remain on the Supervisory Board. Based in Paris, Beylier brings extensive experience from Flowbird Group, APRIL, and IDEMIA. His mandate focuses on integrating AI-driven workflows and high-quality IP data coverage into Questel’s SaaS platforms. This leadership transition aims to strengthen the company’s client-centric ecosystem and navigate significant industry transformations through rapid technological growth and strategic consolidation.
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should closely monitor Questel’s strategic shift toward AI-integrated service models. The appointment signals a broader industry trend where traditional IP management is evolving into data-driven, automated ecosystems. Companies operating in Europe should evaluate how these emerging tools impact patent mining efficiency and monitoring costs. Leveraging integrated platforms can optimize overseas IP asset management and enhance decision-making precision in complex competitive landscapes. Proactively engaging with updated vendor capabilities may offer significant operational advantages and cost efficiencies for in-house counsel and IP teams managing global portfolios.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Questel任命技术高管Frederic Beylier为新CEO，常驻巴黎总部，接…", "Beylier曾任Flowbird集团CEO及IDEMIA首席运营官，具备推动科技企业…", "新任CEO首要任务是强化集成IP生态系统，提升数据质量、SaaS平台及AI驱动工作流能力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Frederic Beylier assumes the CEO role to drive rapid organizational growth and comprehensive technology transformation.", "The new leadership strategy prioritizes integrating AI-enhanced workflows with extensive, high-quality intellectual property data coverage.", "Former CEO Charles Besson transitions to the Supervisory Board to provide continued strategic vision and market expertise."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["Questel战略重心转向AI驱动的IP工作流与集成生态系统，可能改变现有服务模式", "新任CEO具有科技转型背景，预示公司将加大在SaaS平台与技术自动化方面的投入", "需持续观察新管理层是否推出新的产品组合或调整针对欧洲市场的服务策略"]

The new leadership strategy prioritizes integrating AI-enhanced workflows with extensive, high-quality intellectual property data coverage.
Former CEO Charles Besson transitions to the Supervisory Board to provide continued strategic vision and market expertise.

Practice note: Leverage integrated data platforms to enhance the precision and strategic value of European patent filings.
What to monitor: Track the adoption of AI-enhanced workflows by major IP service providers for competitive intelligence.

items.title: TCP: Totally Can’t Purchase — A shortage with long trade mark shadows
items.title_zh: TCP 断货危机：供应链短缺引发的长期商标阴影
items.title_en: TCP Supply Shortage: Trademark Risks from Non-Use, Grey Markets, and Counterfeits
items.summary: For a product that smells like a Victorian infirmary, TCP Antiseptic Liquid has developed a very modern problem: you can’t reliably buy...
items.ai_summary_zh: TCP 消毒液因供应链问题长期断货，引发高价转售。文章指出这带来三大商标风险：长期缺货可能导致“真实使用”受质疑从而面临撤销风险；官方渠道真空滋生灰色市场与平行贸易合规难题；高需求低验证环境极易招致假冒伪劣产品泛滥，品牌方需加强监控。
items.ai_summary_en: TCP Antiseptic Liquid faces prolonged unavailability due to manufacturing and ingredient supply chain issues, leading to opportunistic resale at inflated prices. From a trademark perspective, such shortages create three recurring risk clusters. First, extended absence from shelves may raise questions regarding genuine use, potentially creating evidential gaps if the mark is challenged for non-use cancellation. Second, the vacuum in official channels encourages grey market activities, including parallel imports that may breach quality controls or labeling regulations. Third, high demand combined with low verification environments significantly increases the risk of counterfeit products flooding the market. Rights holders must address these operational challenges to protect brand integrity and maintain legal standing during supply disruptions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中企若遇供应链中断，须刻意保留广告、沟通记录以证明“真实使用”防撤销；同时需立即启动电商监控，打击借机涌入的假货与违规平行进口商品，维护品牌声誉。
items.ai_insight_en: During supply chain interruptions, rights holders should systematically preserve evidence of ongoing commercial activity, such as advertising campaigns and distributor communications, to demonstrate genuine use and mitigate cancellation risks. Simultaneously, brands must activate rapid response mechanisms for e-commerce monitoring to identify and remove counterfeit goods and unauthorized parallel imports exploiting the shortage. Maintaining strict control over channel integrity protects brand reputation and ensures compliance with trademark laws, even when physical product availability is temporarily compromised by external logistical factors.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["长期断货可能造成使用证据缺失，增加商标被撤销的法律风险", "供应真空导致灰色市场活跃，需警惕平行贸易中的包装与质控违规", "短缺环境易诱发假冒泛滥，品牌方应强化平台监控与预防性执法"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Prolonged stockouts create evidential gaps regarding genuine use, increasing the risk of trademark cancellation actions based on non-use.", "Supply vacuums stimulate grey market activity, raising compliance risks related to parallel trade packaging standards and quality control requirements.", "Shortage conditions facilitate counterfeit proliferation, necessitating enhanced platform monitoring and proactive enforcement against infringing listings."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["断货期间需系统性留存商业活动证据，以防商标因非使用被撤销", "建立快速响应机制，重点清理利用缺货漏洞进行的假货与违规销售"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Preserve dated marketing and distribution records during shortages to prove genuine use and defend against non-use cancellation claims.", "Practice note: Implement rapid takedown protocols for e-commerce platforms to combat counterfeits and non-compliant parallel imports arising from supply gaps.", "What to monitor: Track unauthorized reseller listings and grey market channels that emerge when official stock is unavailable to prevent brand dilution."]
core_points_en: Prolonged stockouts create evidential gaps regarding genuine use, increasing the risk of trademark cancellation actions based on non-use.
Supply vacuums stimulate grey market activity, raising compliance risks related to parallel trade packaging standards and quality control requirements.
Shortage conditions facilitate counterfeit proliferation, necessitating enhanced platform monitoring and proactive enforcement against infringing listings.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Preserve dated marketing and distribution records during shortages to prove genuine use and defend against non-use cancellation claims.
Practice note: Implement rapid takedown protocols for e-commerce platforms to combat counterfeits and non-compliant parallel imports arising from supply gaps.
What to monitor: Track unauthorized reseller listings and grey market channels that emerge when official stock is unavailable to prevent brand dilution.

items.title: From AI pricing algorithms to public procurement: UK Competition and Markets Authority publishes its 2026–27 annual plan
items.title_zh: 英竞争局发布 2026-27 年度计划：聚焦算法定价与公共采购
items.title_en: UK CMA 2026-27 Plan: AI Monitoring of Pricing Algorithms and Consumer Protection Priorities
items.summary: On 23 March, the UK Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) published its 2026-2027 Annual Plan (the Annual Plan): the first since the CMA set out its e...
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国竞争与市场管理局（CMA）发布 2026-2027 年度计划，明确未来一年五大战略目标及执行重点。计划强调利用人工智能监控非法活动，特别是针对虚假评论、隐藏费用及算法定价等侵害消费者行为。同时，CMA 将优化案件处理流程，提升透明度，并在牙科、酒店及能源等关键消费领域展开深入调查与改革。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) published its 2026-2027 Annual Plan, aligning operational priorities with the strategic goals outlined in its November 2025 Strategy Report. The plan emphasizes leveraging artificial intelligence to actively monitor unlawful activities, particularly targeting algorithmic pricing, fake reviews, hidden fees, and aggressive sales practices that harm consumers. Procedurally, the CMA aims to streamline case management, enhance transparency regarding ongoing investigations, and provide clearer compliance guidance. Key enforcement actions include market studies in private dental services, competition investigations in the hotel sector, and price monitoring in energy markets. These measures reflect the regulator’s commitment to protecting consumer interests while fostering a pro-investment environment through predictable and proportional enforcement.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在英中企需高度关注 CMA 对算法合规及消费者权益的强化监管。建议立即审查定价算法与营销条款，避免触碰“隐藏费用”红线。同时，应适应其提升透明度的执法新常态，做好应对突击调查与合规问询的准备。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in the UK should anticipate intensified scrutiny of digital pricing mechanisms and consumer-facing contractual terms. The integration of AI into regulatory monitoring suggests that non-compliant algorithmic behaviors may be detected more rapidly than before. Companies are advised to conduct comprehensive audits of their pricing algorithms and marketing materials to ensure alignment with fair trading principles. Furthermore, the emphasis on procedural transparency requires businesses to maintain robust compliance frameworks capable of responding swiftly to regulatory inquiries or dawn raids. Proactive engagement with emerging guidance on hidden fees and cancellation policies is essential to mitigate enforcement risks in high-profile consumer sectors.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["CMA 将利用 AI 技术主动监控算法定价等违法活动", "重点打击虚假评论、隐藏费用及掠夺性销售等行为", "优化案件管理流程，提升执法透明度与可预测性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The CMA will deploy AI capabilities to actively monitor and detect unlawful algorithmic pricing and other digital market abuses.", "Enforcement will prioritize combating fake reviews, hidden fees, unfair contracts, and exploitative sales practices under new consumer laws.", "Procedural reforms aim to streamline caseloads, increase transparency on investigation deadlines, and improve regulatory predictability."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["全面审查算法定价机制，确保符合公平交易原则", "清理合同隐性条款，防范因侵害消费者被重罚"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Businesses must review algorithmic pricing models and remove hidden fees to avoid significant penalties under enhanced consumer protection mandates.", "Practice note: Prepare for increased regulatory scrutiny by establishing internal compliance protocols for digital marketing and dynamic pricing strategies.", "What to monitor: Watch for forthcoming CMA guidance on AI-driven enforcement and specific updates regarding investigations in dental, hospitality, and energy sectors."]
core_points_en: The CMA will deploy AI capabilities to actively monitor and detect unlawful algorithmic pricing and other digital market abuses.
Enforcement will prioritize combating fake reviews, hidden fees, unfair contracts, and exploitative sales practices under new consumer laws.
Procedural reforms aim to streamline caseloads, increase transparency on investigation deadlines, and improve regulatory predictability.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Businesses must review algorithmic pricing models and remove hidden fees to avoid significant penalties under enhanced consumer protection mandates.
Practice note: Prepare for increased regulatory scrutiny by establishing internal compliance protocols for digital marketing and dynamic pricing strategies.
What to monitor: Watch for forthcoming CMA guidance on AI-driven enforcement and specific updates regarding investigations in dental, hospitality, and energy sectors.

items.title: Mewburn secures Summary Judgment for Banham in the Patents Court
items.title_zh: Mewburn 助 Banham 获专利法院即决判决
items.title_en: Mewburn Ellis Secures Summary Judgment for Banham in UK Patents Court
items.summary: Last month, Mewburn successfully secured summary judgment for Banham Patent Locks Limited in the Patents Court in Banham Patent Locks Ltd v Rogers (t/a J Rogers & Sons) [2026] EWHC 528 (Pat) , bringing the proceedings to an early conclusion following a half‑day hearing.
items.ai_summary_zh: Mewburn Ellis 律所代表 Banham Patent Locks 有限公司，在英国专利法院诉 Rogers 一案中成功获得即决判决。该案经过半日听证后提前结案，法院裁定支持原告主张。此结果展示了英国专利诉讼程序中即决判决机制在快速解决无实质争议案件方面的高效性。
items.ai_summary_en: Mewburn Ellis successfully obtained summary judgment for Banham Patent Locks Limited in the UK Patents Court case of Banham Patent Locks Ltd v Rogers (t/a J Rogers & Sons) [2026] EWHC 528 (Pat). The proceedings concluded rapidly following a concise half-day hearing, with the court ruling in favor of the claimant. This outcome underscores the efficiency of the summary judgment mechanism within the UK patent litigation framework. It demonstrates how courts can swiftly resolve cases where there is no realistic prospect of a successful defense, thereby avoiding the time and cost associated with full trials. The decision highlights the strategic importance of early procedural motions in clearing unmeritorious defenses and securing decisive legal outcomes for rights holders.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注英国专利诉讼中的即决判决风险，避免在无充分抗辩理由时陷入被动。建议在欧洲布局时提前进行自由实施分析，并储备应对快速程序的证据资源，以防被对手利用程序规则快速击溃。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants operating in or exporting to the UK should be aware of the risks associated with summary judgment applications in patent disputes. Courts may dispose of cases quickly if defendants lack substantial grounds for defense. To mitigate exposure, companies should conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses prior to market entry. Additionally, maintaining robust evidence reserves is critical to respond effectively to fast-track procedural challenges. Proactive preparation helps prevent opponents from leveraging procedural rules to achieve rapid adverse judgments, ensuring better protection of commercial interests during early-stage litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Mewburn 协助客户在英国专利法院赢得即决判决", "案件经半日听证即告终结，显著缩短诉讼周期", "确认了即决判决在清除无抗辩理由侵权案中的作用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Mewburn Ellis secured summary judgment for Banham in the UK Patents Court against Rogers.", "The case concluded after a brief half-day hearing, significantly reducing the overall litigation timeline.", "The ruling confirms the utility of summary judgment in resolving infringement claims lacking viable defenses."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["警惕英国专利诉讼中即决判决带来的快速败诉风险", "出口企业需提前开展 FTO 分析并储备应诉证据"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Be alert to the risk of rapid adverse judgments via summary judgment in UK patent litigation.", "Practice note: Conduct comprehensive FTO analysis before market entry and maintain ready evidence for swift procedural responses.", "What to monitor: Opponents' use of procedural mechanisms to expedite case resolution and secure early victories."]
core_points_en: Mewburn Ellis secured summary judgment for Banham in the UK Patents Court against Rogers.
The case concluded after a brief half-day hearing, significantly reducing the overall litigation timeline.
The ruling confirms the utility of summary judgment in resolving infringement claims lacking viable defenses.

Practice note: Conduct comprehensive FTO analysis before market entry and maintain ready evidence for swift procedural responses.
What to monitor: Opponents' use of procedural mechanisms to expedite case resolution and secure early victories.

items.title: 15 years of IP Draughts, and a few other things
items.title_zh: IP Draughts博客十五周年回顾与法律实务变迁
items.title_en: IP Draughts Marks Fifteen Years: Leadership Changes and Key UK IP Developments
items.summary: In March 2011, IP Draughts' then trainee, AnnMarie Humphries, designed this blog, including choosing the image of Mr Pettifog. 15 years later, AnnMarie is to become the new managing partner of Anderson Law LLP, while IP Draughts is moving to a new role as chairman. Congratulations, AnnMarie! IP Draughts is not retiring. He will continue…
items.ai_summary_zh: 知名知识产权博客IP Draughts迎来十五周年，创始人晋升为律所管理合伙人并转任主席。文章回顾了2011年以来的关键议题：包括UCL IP交易课程的设立、英国“IP威胁”条款的立法修订、Kitchin法官晋升最高法院，以及大学衍生企业许可模式的探讨。作者指出尽管有TenU指南，但仍有必要制定由UKRI赞助的标准投资协议模板，以促进高校科技成果转化。
items.ai_summary_en: The prominent intellectual property blog IP Draughts celebrates its fifteenth anniversary. Founder AnnMarie Humphries, who originally designed the site in 2011, is transitioning to Managing Partner at Anderson Law LLP, while the author assumes the role of Chairman. The article reflects on significant UK IP developments since inception, including the establishment of the UCL IP Transactions course, substantial legislative revisions to IP threats provisions, and the judicial elevation of Lord Kitchin to the Supreme Court. It also examines university technology transfer models, noting that while the TenU Guide exists, a standardized investment agreement template sponsored by UKRI remains necessary to streamline spin-out transactions and enhance efficiency in academic commercialization.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业应关注英国在IP威胁条款及高校技术许可方面的政策演变，这影响跨境维权策略与技术引进成本。建议利用标准化合同模板降低合作风险，并密切关注英国司法体系对IP案件审理趋势的变化，以优化在欧洲的知识产权布局与合规管理。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should track the evolution of UK IP legislation and judicial trends, as these factors directly influence cross-border enforcement strategies and technology acquisition costs. The ongoing discussion regarding standardized agreements for university spin-outs highlights a persistent gap in current practice. Utilizing established contract frameworks can mitigate legal and commercial risks associated with technology transfer. Rights holders operating in Europe should monitor these policy shifts to optimize compliance management and ensure robust protection of intellectual assets during collaborative research and commercialization efforts.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["IP Draughts博客运营十五年，创始人角色转变但仍活跃于学术与客户工作", "回顾英国IP立法修订、司法人事变动及专业教育课程的发展历程", "呼吁建立标准化的大学衍生企业投资协议模板以优化技术转移效率"]

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注英国IP立法与司法动态，调整跨境维权与技术引进策略", "利用标准化合同模板降低高校技术转化中的法律与商业风险"]

Review of major UK IP milestones includes legislative reforms on threats actions and significant judicial appointments within higher courts.

items.title: JUB : la Division locale de Paris confirme sa compétence dans l’affaire Sun Patent Trust c. Vivo
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院巴黎分部确认 Sun 诉 Vivo 案管辖权
items.title_en: UPC Paris Division Confirms Jurisdiction in Sun Patent Trust v. Vivo Case
items.summary: Par Olivier Rocher, Conseil en Propriété Industrielle, Mandataire en Brevets Européen, Représentant devant la JUB au cabinet LAVOIX Maître Pierre-Emmanuel Meynard, Avocat à la Cour, Représentant devant la JUB au cabinet LAVOIX Kylian Treguer, stagiaire au cabinet LAVOIX L’ordonnance rendue le 30 octobre 2025 par la Division locale de Paris de la Juridiction unifiée du […] L’article JUB : la Division locale de Paris confirme sa compétence dans l’affaire Sun Patent Trust c. Vivo est apparu en prem
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析统一专利法院（UPC）巴黎地方分院于 2025 年 10 月 30 日作出的命令，确认其对 Sun Patent Trust 起诉 Vivo 一案拥有管辖权。该裁定驳回了被告可能提出的管辖异议，明确了巴黎分部在审理此类跨国专利纠纷中的程序地位，为案件进入实体审理阶段扫清了障碍，体现了 UPC 运作机制的进一步成熟。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines the order issued on October 30, 2025, by the Local Division of the Unified Patent Court (UPC) in Paris, confirming its jurisdiction over the dispute between Sun Patent Trust and Vivo. The ruling effectively rejects potential jurisdictional challenges raised by the defendant, thereby clarifying the procedural standing of the Paris Division in handling such cross-border patent disputes. By establishing clear jurisdiction, this decision removes procedural obstacles and paves the way for the case to proceed to substantive examination regarding infringement or validity. This development underscores the increasing maturity and operational stability of the UPC’s judicial mechanisms in managing complex international litigation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国手机厂商需警惕 UPC 巴黎分部的活跃态势，其确立管辖权意味着诉讼风险实质化。建议企业提前评估涉案专利稳定性，制定包括反诉无效在内的综合应诉策略，避免缺席判决导致的市场禁入风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should closely monitor the active stance of the UPC Paris Division, as confirmed jurisdiction signals a substantial increase in litigation risk. Rights holders facing non-practicing entities should proactively assess the stability of asserted patents and develop comprehensive defense strategies, including counterclaims for invalidity, to mitigate the risk of market exclusion via default judgments. Early preparation of local resources is essential for effective representation before the Paris bench.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["巴黎地方分院正式裁定拥有 Sun 诉 Vivo 案的审理管辖权", "年 10 月命令标志着该案将进入实体侵权或无效审理", "律所专家解读凸显 UPC 程序规则在跨境诉讼中的确定性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Paris Local Division formally ruled that it possesses jurisdiction to hear the patent dispute filed by Sun Patent Trust against Vivo.", "The October 2025 order signifies that the case will advance to substantive proceedings concerning alleged infringement or patent validity.", "Expert legal interpretation highlights the growing certainty provided by UPC procedural rules in resolving cross-border litigation matters."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重视 UPC 管辖权确认信号，提前布局巴黎分部应诉资源", "针对非实施实体诉讼，应主动利用 UPC 程序发起无效反击"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Treat jurisdiction confirmation as a critical signal to allocate resources for UPC Paris Division proceedings immediately.", "Practice note: Against non-practicing entity suits, actively utilize UPC procedures to launch invalidity counterattacks rather than relying solely on defense.", "What to monitor: The evolving procedural posture of the Paris Local Division in high-profile cross-border patent enforcement actions."]
core_points_en: The Paris Local Division formally ruled that it possesses jurisdiction to hear the patent dispute filed by Sun Patent Trust against Vivo.
The October 2025 order signifies that the case will advance to substantive proceedings concerning alleged infringement or patent validity.
Expert legal interpretation highlights the growing certainty provided by UPC procedural rules in resolving cross-border litigation matters.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Treat jurisdiction confirmation as a critical signal to allocate resources for UPC Paris Division proceedings immediately.
Practice note: Against non-practicing entity suits, actively utilize UPC procedures to launch invalidity counterattacks rather than relying solely on defense.
What to monitor: The evolving procedural posture of the Paris Local Division in high-profile cross-border patent enforcement actions.

It further analyzes significant trends in competition law scrutiny and litigation patterns within both the United Kingdom and broader European markets. Additionally, the report incorporates industry perspectives on the changing responsibilities and strategic importance of in-house legal teams. By consolidating these diverse yet interconnected topics, the publication aims to equip practitioners with essential knowledge regarding the key issues currently shaping the biotech landscape, ensuring stakeholders remain informed about the most impactful legal and commercial shifts affecting the industry today.

items.title: Cup&Cino wins with Boehmert & Boehmert in dispute over milk frothers
items.title_zh: Cup&Cino 在德国奶泡器专利纠纷中胜诉
items.title_en: Cup&Cino Prevails in German Milk Frother Patent Dispute Against Alpina
items.summary: Cup&Cino owns three patents protecting technology for milk frothers. EP 3 398 487 protects a “method and device for producing milk foam”, EP 3 281 569 covers a “modular foam unit” and EP 3 610 762 a “device for treating a liquid, in particular milk, with integrated rinsing system and method for rinsing”. The German […] The post Cup&Cino wins with Boehmert & Boehmert in dispute over milk frothers appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: Cup&Cino 公司凭借三项欧洲专利（涵盖奶泡制备方法及模块化组件），在德国针对 Alpina 的专利侵权纠纷中获得胜利。该案由 Boehmert & Boehmert 律所代理，标志着权利人在更换 counsel 后成功捍卫了其液体处理及清洗系统的专利技术权益，体现了德国市场对专利保护的执行力。
items.ai_summary_en: Cup&Cino has secured a victory in a German patent infringement dispute against Alpina concerning milk frother technology. The rights holder relies on three European patents covering methods for producing milk foam, modular foam units, and liquid treatment devices with integrated rinsing systems. Represented by Boehmert & Boehmert, Cup&Cino successfully defended its intellectual property rights after changing legal counsel during the proceedings. This outcome underscores the effectiveness of the German judicial system in enforcing patent protections for complex electromechanical appliances. The case highlights the strategic importance of selecting experienced local litigation teams to navigate procedural challenges and secure favorable judgments in cross-border IP conflicts involving consumer electronics and fluid handling technologies.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国小家电出口企业需警惕德国专利壁垒，尤其在流体处理领域。建议出海前进行详尽 FTO 分析，避免侵犯此类方法或结构专利；遇诉时应尽早聘请当地资深律所，策略性应对以争取有利和解或判决。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants exporting small household appliances to Europe must conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses prior to entry, particularly regarding fluid processing technologies. German patent enforcement remains rigorous, making early risk assessment critical to avoid costly litigation. In the event of disputes, engaging specialized local counsel is essential for effective defense strategies. Companies should monitor ongoing developments in this sector to understand evolving judicial interpretations of method and apparatus claims, ensuring robust compliance and strategic positioning within the European market landscape.
